title: Small Business Website Updates
description:
Hi! I'm looking for an experienced WordPress + Elementor developer for a small, straightforward project on my mom's wellness practice website.



This is a simple site — no ecommerce, no complex functionality. I will provide all content and copy. I just need a clean, reliable executor.



---



SCOPE OF WORK



1. New Service Page — Build one new page for a "Spelling to Communicate (S2C)" service. Simple layout, consistent with the existing site design. Content provided.



2. Homepage Update — Redesign the homepage to act as a clear hub with a short intro and two pathway buttons (Homeopathy and S2C) linking to each service.



3. Navigation Menu Fix — Restructure the menu so Homeopathy and S2C clients each have their own section, with sub-items linking to their respective forms.



4. PDF Forms — Upload provided PDF forms and link them in the correct menu locations for easy download.



5. Remove Broken Button — Delete a non-functioning PayPal button.



6. Bonus (nice to have) — Set up a 301 redirect from /programs/ to /homeopathy/ and resubmit the sitemap via Google Search Console.



---



REQUIREMENTS

- Proven experience with WordPress and Elementor (please share examples)

- Reliable communication in English

- Ability to match existing site style

- Available to start soon



---



TO APPLY

Please send:

- Your hourly rate or fixed price estimate for this scope

- 1–2 examples of similar Elementor sites you've built

- Your availability



Looking forward to hearing from you!

title: Senior E-commerce Specialist (Amazon + BigCommerce + Photoshop) – 10,000+ SKU Catalog
description:
We are a U.S.-based e-commerce company in the art and framing industry with a large and growing catalog of 10,000+ products.



We are hiring a FULL-TIME, long-term tea
mber with strong experience in:

- Bulk product uploads (spreadsheet / CSV / Excel)

- Amazon Seller Central

- BigCommerce (or similar platforms)

- Photoshop / product image editing



THIS IS NOT A BASIC VA ROLE.



You must be comfortable managing large-scale product data AND handling design-related tasks. This role requires accuracy, organization, and experience working with complex product catalogs.



Responsibilities:

- Bulk product uploads using spreadsheets (CSV / Excel)

- Managing and updating a large catalog (10,000+ SKUs)

- Working inside Amazon Seller Central (product listings, updates, variations)

- Uploading and managing products in BigCommerce

- Handling product variations (sizes, colors, SKUs, pricing)

- Photoshop work (image resizing, clean edits, basic design improvements)

- Maintaining accuracy across large product datasets



REQUIRED (MANDATORY):

- Proven experience with bulk product uploads using spreadsheets (CSV / Excel)

- Experience with Amazon Seller Central (listings, bulk updates, or similar)

- Experience with BigCommerce, Shopify, or similar platform

- Strong Photoshop skills (must be able to edit and prepare product images)

- Experience working with large product catalogs (thousands of SKUs)

- High attention to detail (critical for this role)



BONUS (PREFERRED):

- Experience with Amazon bulk uploads (flat files)

- Experience with SEO or product page optimization



IMPORTANT – READ CAREFULLY:



To be considered, you MUST answer the following:



1. Describe your experience with bulk product uploads using spreadsheets

2. What is the largest catalog you have worked with?

3. Describe your experience with Amazon Seller Central

4. Describe your Photoshop experience (what tasks have you done?)

5. Share examples of your work (screenshots or portfolio)



Include the word CATALOG in your application so we know you read this.



Applications without detailed answers will be ignored.



Salary: $900–$1,600/month (based on experience)

Full-time (40 hours/week)



GROWTH OPPORTUNITY:



This is a long-term position.



We are building a strong team, and high-performing candidates will have opportunities for:

- Increased salary over time

- More hours and responsibility

- Advancement into higher-level roles within our company



We reward reliability, accuracy, and strong performance.



If you are looking for a long-term opportunity to grow with a serious e-commerce business, this is the right role for you.

title: Accountant
description:
Remote Accountant Wanted!



Company: Niyyah Edge (
)

Location: Remote from Home

Employment Type: Full-Time

Working Hours: Monday – Friday, 9am – 5:00?pm (UK Time)

Holiday: 20 days per annum (increasing to 28 days after 3 years)

Probation Period: 6 months



About Niyyah Edge



Niyyah Edge is a growing organisation dedicated to delivering high-quality services with integrity, professionalism, and excellence.



We are seeking a highly organised, detail-oriented, and proactive Accountant to manage the financial operations of the business. The successful candidate will ensure accurate financial reporting, compliance, and efficient financial processes that support the company’s growth.



Key Responsibilities – Finance Focus



* Manage day-to-day accounting, cash flow and bookkeeping activities

* Prepare and issue invoices, monitor receivables, and follow up on outstanding payments

* Process supplier payments, employee expense claims, and other financial transactions

* Maintain accurate financial records, ledgers, and documentation

* Perform monthly bank reconciliations

* Assist with preparation of monthly management accounts and daily/weekly financial reports

* Monitor cash flow, expenditures, and overall financial performance

* Support preparation of financial summaries for leadership review

* Maintain records for UK tax, audit, and UK compliance purposes

* Liaise with external accountants, auditors, and financial advisors as needed

* Ensure financial controls, compliance, and accounting best practices are maintained



Requirements



Essential:



* Must have strong English in speaking and writing

* Degree or professional qualification in Accounting, Finance, or a related field

* Previous experience in accounting, finance, or financial administration

* Strong organisational skills and high attention to detail

* Experience using accounting software (Xero, QuickBooks, or similar)

* Ability to manage multiple finance responsibilities independently



Preferred:



* Experience supporting financial reporting in a small, growing, or entrepreneurial business



Why Join Niyyah Edge



* Work in a growing and ambitious organisation

* Lead financial processes and reporting across the business

* Opportunity to take ownership of accounting and contribute to strategic financial decisions

* Supportive and professional working environment



NEXT STEPS



Submit your CV and a short cover letter outlining your accounting and finance experience, and why you are suitable for this role.

title: Annotations Ops Manager (Video Data)
description:
VisionLab is building the data layer for physical AI by capturing and structuring real-world industrial workflows using video and SOP-level process knowledge. We are looking for an AI Data Operations Manager to own and scale our annotation pipeline end-to-end.



You will be responsible for recruiting and managing annotators, designing onboarding and training programs, and overseeing daily annotation operations to ensure high-quality outputs. This includes managing throughput, meeting SLAs, and coordinating across annotators, QA reviewers, and internal teams. A key part of the role is building and maintaining strong quality control systems, including multi-layer review, sampling strategies, and accuracy tracking, to consistently achieve high annotation accuracy (?95%). You will also track performance metrics (throughput, accuracy, cost) and continuously improve efficiency through better processes, tooling, and incentive structures.



Requirements: at least 2 years of experience managing annotation or labeling projects (video preferred), prior experience managing teams, and familiarity with tools such as CVAT, Label Studio, or similar annotations tool. Strong understanding of quality control workflows is required. Experience in computer vision, multimodal data, or companies such as Scale AI, Appen, Surge AI, TELUS, or similar is a strong plus.

title: YouTube Video Editor Needed for Entrepreneur/Dropshipping Channel (2 Videos/Week)
description:
I am an entrepreneur running a successful dropshipping business, and I am launching a YouTube channel to document my journey and share what I’ve learned. I have high-quality raw footage (shot on a DJI camera) and I am looking for a talented, reliable Video Editor to take full ownership of the editing process.



My goal is to post 2 videos per week:



1.

One Lifestyle/Vlog Video: Documenting my daily life, driving, working, and the reality of running a business.



2.

One Educational/Talking-Head Video: Sharing specific dropshipping strategies, business lessons, and advice.



What You Will Do:



•

Take raw footage (often 20+ minutes of unedited video) and cut it down into an engaging, polished 8–15 minute YouTube video.



•

Adapt your editing style to fit the video type (e.g., fast-paced and narrative-driven for vlogs; clean, structured, and visually supported for educational videos).



•

Add engaging elements: background music, sound effects, text overlays, B-roll, and smooth transitions to maximize viewer retention.



•

Perform basic color grading and audio enhancement to ensure a professional look and sound.



•

Work independently. I will upload the raw footage to Google Drive, and I need you to find the story, make the cuts, and deliver a finished product.



What I Am Looking For:



•

Proven experience editing YouTube videos, specifically in the entrepreneurship, business, or lifestyle vlog niches.



•

Proficiency in professional editing software (Premiere Pro, Final Cut Pro, or DaVinci Resolve).



•

A strong understanding of YouTube pacing, retention strategies, and storytelling.



•

Someone who is proactive and requires minimal hand-holding. I want to focus on filming; you focus on making it look great.



Budget & Workflow:



•

The starting salary is $500/month for part-time work (approx. 2 videos per week). There is room for this to grow into a full-time role with higher pay as the channel grows.



•

We will use Google Drive for file sharing.



How to Apply:

Please send a message through OnlineJobs.ph with the following:



1.

A link to your portfolio, YouTube channel, or a Google Drive folder with your work.



2.

Specifically: 1 link to a vlog-style video you’ve edited, and 1 link to an educational/talking-head video you’ve edited.



3.

Your typical turnaround time for a 10-minute video.



Applications without relevant portfolio links will not be considered.



WAGE/SALARY



500 month



DESIRED NO. OF HOURS PER WEEK



10-20

title: Product & Shopify Operator (AI Images + High-Converting Product Pages)
description:
IMPORTANT: Only apply if you have real, hands-on experience managing Shopify stores and creating high-quality product pages. If you are a beginner or only did basic product uploads, do NOT apply.



We are looking for a Product & Shopify Operator to join a fast-growing e-commerce brand in the US market.



This is NOT a basic VA role. We are looking for someone who can take ownership, is a real leader, move fast, and help build and improve our store.



Your responsibilities:



* Create and optimize high-converting Shopify product pages

* Generate high-quality product images using AI tools (Nano Banana, Midjourney, etc.)

* Structure product pages (images, flow, benefits, trust elements)

* Upload and manage products (variants, pricing, collections)

* Expand and organize collections aligned with the brand

* Improve existing product pages and overall store quality

* Support day-to-day Shopify operations



This role is for someone who:



* Thinks beyond tasks and takes ownership

* Works fast and accurately

* Understands what makes a product page convert

* Can maintain and improve a clean, high-quality store



Requirements:



* Proven Shopify experience (must)

* Strong product listing and page-building skills

* Experience with AI tools for product images and content

* Good understanding of e-commerce / DTC brands operations

* High attention to detail

* Fluent English



We are NOT looking for:



* Basic data entry VAs

* People who only copy products from AliExpress

* Beginners without real experience

* Only product listing experience (we are looking for someone that can manage a whole store and all settings)



Growth:

This role can grow into a Store Manager position for the right person who proves ownership and performance.



To apply:



1. Start your application with the word: OPERATOR

2. Send 1-2 Shopify product pages you personally worked on and 1-2 AI product images you created (with explanation of what you did)

3. Record a short Loom (max 2 minutes) explaining your experience with managing shopify stores (tell us also how big those brands/companies were that you worked for)

4. Explain what makes a product page convert



We only review applications that follow all instructions.

title: AI Creative Strategist – EU Fashion Dropshipping
description:
Who are we?



We are an international e-commerce company operating multiple fashion dropshipping stores on Shopify, mainly targeting customers in Europe and Latin America.



Our brands have generated over $1,500,000 in online sales, and we are now scaling aggressively by improving our creative strategy and ad performance.



We operate in a high-volume, fast-paced environment, where creatives are the main driver of growth.



Who are we looking for?



We are looking for a Creative Strategist specialized in EU Fashion Dropshipping, who understands how to create high-converting creatives adapted to European audiences.



This is not just a video editing role.

We need someone who understands:



• European customer expectations

• Fashion buying behavior (especially women 40–65+)

• Direct response marketing (Meta Ads)

• Creatives that feel authentic and native



Main tasks:



• Create high-converting video ads (AI-generated, product-focused)

• Produce creatives adapted to EU markets (FR / ES / IT / DE)

• Write hooks, scripts, and emotional angles for fashion products

• Create AI-based videos (from product images or raw assets)

• Test multiple variations (hooks, formats, audiences)

• Spy competitors and adapt winning concepts to our brands



Requirements:



• Proven experience in fashion dropshipping (EU market preferred)

• Strong understanding of Meta Ads creatives

• Ability to create UGC-style ads that feel real (not over-edited)

• Experience with AI tools (CapCut, Runway, Kling, etc.)

• Good understanding of customer psychology

• Ability to work fast and produce volume



Big plus:



• Experience targeting women 45–65+

• Experience in multi-country stores (FR / ES / IT)

• Experience working with dropshipping



What we offer:



• 100% remote

• Flexible working hours

• Long-term collaboration

• Performance-driven environment

• Opportunity to grow into a Head of Creative role

• Performance bonus

title: Video Editor (E-commerce, Meta Ads)
description:
###About Us

We're an e-commerce company selling physical products in Europe — mostly in Poland, but expanding into other markets. We've done over $1M in total sales and we're still growing.

Our products are for women and men aged 35–45+. Things that solve real problems people deal with every day. We keep our product range small on purpose — a few carefully picked products and stores, and we put everything into making them work through strong creative.

The team is small. Everyone here has a real impact on results.



###The Role

We're hiring a full-time Video Editor (8 hours/day) to create video ads that stop the scroll and drive sales — for Meta only. No TikTok, no YouTube, nothing else.

You'll work with us directly. We take care of strategy — we'll give you scripts, creative direction, video clips for hooks, and access to footage library and ai tools. Your job is to bring those scripts to life: find the right footage, edit it into a finished ad, and make sure every second counts.

After each ad you finish, you'll get a short review from us — what we liked, what to change, and why. You'll always know where you stand.



###What You'll Be Making

 • Brand voice ads (1–2 minutes) — built to look and feel like real customer content — voiceover + footage or AI UGC format

 • Hook swaps — take a winning ad and swap out the first few seconds to create new test versions. We do 3 hooks per 1 hold

 • Testimonial-style ads — designed to feel like genuine customer content — either voiceover-driven or AI UGC avatars



###What Are Your Responsibilities

 • Edit ad concepts from script to final version — quality over quantity, always. If a solid 2-minute ad takes two days, that's fine. We'd rather have something great than something rushed

 • Source footage online to match the script

 • Add captions and subtitles to all videos

 • Add background music that fits

 • Generate AI voiceovers with ElevenLabs

 • Create AI UGC avatars

 • Generate AI video clips when needed

 • Send a short daily update — what you worked on and where things are



###What We Need

 • Real experience editing e-commerce video ads that actually convert — a few years is great, but even a few months is fine if your work speaks for itself

 • A good feel for what makes content look authentic, engaging, and hard to scroll past

 • Experience with ElevenLabs or similar AI voiceover tools

 • Familiarity with AI avatar and video generation tools — we'll give you access to everything you'll need

 • You can find the footage and put together ads where the visuals and script feel natural together

 • Communicative English

 • Reliable and independent — you don't need someone looking over your shoulder



###Nice to Have

 • Experience making ads in Polish



###What We Offer

 • $1,000–2,000 USD/month depending on experience. Your pay grows as results grow — we don't keep salaries flat when the brand is scaling

 • 13th month pay after working together for a while

 • Performance bonuses when the work is exceptional

 • Full-time, 8 hours/day — work whatever hours suit you, no European timezone overlap needed

 • No screen recording, no time tracking — we trust you. Just keep us updated daily

 • We provide all tools subscriptions you need to create better ads

 • Proper onboarding from day one — we'll walk you through our process, tools, and what good work looks like for us

 • This is a long-term thing — we're not looking for a freelancer, we want someone to grow with



###How to Apply

Send us a message about yourself and your experience.

A short Loom video (a few minutes) is optional — but if you're comfortable doing one, we'd love to see it. It's the easiest way to show us who you are and how you think about editing ads.

If you're open to doing a quick sample task — one hook and one hold from a script we give you — that's the fastest way to stand out and move straight to an offer.



If you'd rather skip the sample, that's okay too. If your portfolio is strong enough, we'll go straight into a short paid trial (about two weeks) to see if we're a good fit for each other.



We work with people, not just output. If something isn't working for you — tell us.

title: CREATIVE STRATEGIST — In-house · Full-time · Remote
description:
Who We Are



Rogier’s Ecom Fzco is a fast-moving direct-to-consumer e-commerce company operating multiple brands across Europe, the US, and beyond. We run paid media at scale across Meta, Google, and Pinterest — and we’re building the creative engine that keeps us ahead.



We don’t do slow. We test fast, kill fast, and scale what wins.



The Role



We’re hiring a Creative Strategist to sit directly alongside our Media Buyer and turn winning data into winning creatives — consistently, month over month.



You’re not just making content. You’re studying the market, identifying what stops the scroll, and building ad concepts that convert cold traffic into buyers. You understand that a great visual without a great hook is worthless — and you obsess over both.



What You’ll Do



Daily



? Study winning and losing ads across our brands — understand why they perform



? Fill 2-8 ad briefs per day with content, angles, and visual direction



? Work directly with the Media Buyer to align creative output with what’s working in market



? Review produced creatives inside our CRM and ensure briefs are executed correctly



? Iterate fast on losing concepts — no ego, only data



Weekly



? Perform in-depth market and competitor research



? Attend Monday creative sync — review winners, losers, and new angles



? Deliver new creative batch before Wednesday every week



? Keep 2-5 fresh concepts per winning product in the pipeline at all times



Ongoing



? Source and qualify content creators for UGC generation



? Manage content pipelines to ensure we never run dry on assets



? Build and maintain a creative asset library per brand



? Attend weekly team calls and contribute new ideas proactively



What We’re Looking For



Must-haves



? Minimum 1 year creating or strategizing ads for DTC e-commerce brands



? Proven understanding of direct response — hooks, angles, scroll-stopping formats



? You can write copy AND direct visuals — not one or the other



? Fluent English — written and spoken



? You’ve worked inside a fast-paced remote team before



Character



? You watch ads the way others watch Netflix — obsessively



? Data doesn’t intimidate you — it excites you



? You take feedback without ego and iterate without being asked



? Highly organized, punctual, strong attention to detail



? Coachable and hungry to grow



This Is NOT For You If:



? You need hand-holding to produce work



? You don’t understand e-commerce or paid media



? You’re not obsessed with what makes people buy



? You can’t handle a fast, high-output environment



? You think creativity is just aesthetics



What You Get



? $2,500/month — fully remote



? Work directly with a senior media buyer and see results of your work in real numbers



? Fast-growing multi-brand portfolio — your work scales across multiple markets



? High-performance culture — results are rewarded

title: Operations Manager
description:
Company: Patriot Holdings International

Location: Philippines (Remote)

Schedule: Must work with significant overlap to U.S. business hours

Travel: None required



About Patriot Holdings International

Patriot Holdings International is a U.S.-based facilities management and construction services company supporting multi-location clients across the United States. We manage maintenance programs, repair coordination, project support, vendor performance, closeout documentation, estimating workflows, and billing support across a fast-moving national service environment.

We are expanding our Philippines-based team and are looking for a strong Operations Manager to help drive execution, accountability, and consistency across our support operation.



Position Overview

This role is responsible for making sure service work moves cleanly from intake to completion to billing. You will oversee the team handling daily coordination, escalations, documentation, vendor follow-up, and operational support tied to facilities maintenance and construction-related work.

This is not a general admin or generic BPO management role. We are specifically looking for someone with hands-on experience in facilities, maintenance, construction, field service, or service delivery operations who understands how to manage time-sensitive work, people, and process.



What You’ll Be Responsible For Service Delivery & Escalation Management

- Oversee daily execution across work order support, vendor coordination, updates, documentation, and closeout

- Monitor stuck jobs, aging work, missed updates, approval delays, and invoice blockers

- Ensure issues are escalated early and resolved quickly

- Maintain a high standard of responsiveness and communication across the team



Facilities & Construction Workflow Oversight

- Support workflows tied to reactive maintenance, repair coordination, project support, and service delivery

- Help ensure estimates, approvals, scopes, closeout packages, and billing handoffs are accurate

- Work closely with team members to keep jobs organized and moving



People Leadership

- Supervise coordinators and support staff responsible for daily execution

- Set performance expectations for speed, follow-up, detail, and professionalism

- Coach team members, correct poor habits, and improve accountability

- Assist with onboarding, training, and team development as the department grows



Process Control & Operational Discipline

- Create and improve SOPs for recurring tasks and common failure points

- Reduce rework, missed handoffs, invoice issues, and communication gaps

- Build better structure around priorities, ownership, and reporting

- Help leadership identify patterns, bottlenecks, and areas needing improvement



Performance Reporting

- Track operational metrics such as open job aging, response times, closeout status, billing readiness, and productivity

- Provide leadership with clean updates on issues, trends, and team performance

- Support weekly performance reviews and action planning



What We’re Looking For (Required)

- 3+ years of experience managing service delivery, operations, or support teams

- Direct experience in facilities management, maintenance coordination, construction operations, field services, or similar

- Strong experience leading people in a deadline-driven environment

- Strong English communication skills, written and verbal

- High attention to detail, strong follow-up habits, and ability to manage multiple moving parts

- Able to work U.S.-aligned hours from the Philippines



Strongly Preferred

- Experience with estimating support, invoicing, billing, closeouts, or vendor compliance

- Experience working with subcontractors, technicians, or field service vendors

- Familiarity with work order systems, service platforms, or client portals

- Experience supporting U.S.-based companies or national account programs



What Success Looks Like

- Fewer jobs get stuck or overlooked

- The team communicates faster and more clearly

- Documentation, estimates, and billing support improve in accuracy and turnaround time

- Leadership has better visibility into service issues before they become bigger problems

- The department runs with more discipline, structure, and consistency



Remote Work Requirements

- Reliable laptop or desktop

- Stable high-speed internet

- Quality headset

- Quiet, professional work environment

- Patriot provides company systems access, company
, and the tools needed to perform the role.



Compensation

Competitive compensation based on experience and qualifications. Details will be discussed during the interview process.



How to Apply

Please submit your resume and include a short note covering:

- Your direct experience in facilities, maintenance, construction, or field service operations

- The type of teams or service workflows you have managed

- Any experience with vendors, closeouts, estimating, invoicing, or service escalations

- Confirmation that you can work U.S. hours from the Philippines



Interested Parties may submit their CV/Resume to

title: Finance Analyst/ Account Analyst
description:
Atrium Housing is a mission-driven real estate development firm focused on creating affordable housing and vibrant communities. Our projects span mixed-finance and LIHTC transactions, and we pride ourselves on delivering high-quality, impactful housing solutions while fostering a collaborative, supportive, and growth-oriented work environment.



At Atrium, you’ll have the opportunity to learn directly from experienced development professionals, work on meaningful projects that impact communities, and build a strong foundation for a career in real estate finance and affordable housing development.



Role Purpose



As a Development Analyst, you’ll support affordable housing transactions through financial underwriting, due diligence coordination, and application support. While LIHTC experience is a plus, it is not required—what matters most is your analytical mindset, attention to detail, and eagerness to learn.



Primary Value You’ll Bring:



* Accurate underwriting and financial modeling

* Organized and reliable diligence tracking

* High-quality application support for housing agencies, investors, and lenders



What You’ll Do



* Build and maintain detailed financial models and sources-and-uses statements (LIHTC exposure is a bonus)

* Prepare rent schedules, operating pro formas, and subsidy layering analyses

* Support preparation of state housing agency applications

* Coordinate third-party reports such as market studies, appraisals, environmental studies, and surveys

* Maintain due diligence and closing checklists

* Assist with investor, lender, and internal memos



What We’re Looking For



Technical Competencies:



* Intermediate to advanced Excel skills (formulas, pivot tables, modeling)

* LIHTC fundamentals (ideal, not required)

* Strong data organization



Behavioral Competencies:



* High attention to detail

* Responsiveness and proactive communication

* Strong accountability and ownership



Qualifications:



* Bachelor’s degree in Finance, Accounting, Real Estate, Economics, Planning, or related field

* 0–3 years of relevant experience

* Strong analytical and organizational skills

* Performance Metrics

* Accuracy and reliability of underwriting

* Timeliness of deliverables

* Quality and completeness of application materials

* Responsiveness to team and project needs



Why You’ll Love Working at Atrium Housing



* Impactful work: Contribute to projects that provide affordable housing and improve communities.

* Professional growth: Learn from experienced development professionals and gain exposure to mixed-finance and LIHTC projects.

* Collaborative culture: Work with a supportive, mission-driven team where your contributions matter.

* Flexible remote work: Balance your professional growth with personal life while collaborating across time zones.



To apply, answer these questions via vocaroo and send your link.

1. What struck your interest about the role?

2. What's your experience in handling finance especially in the construction industry?

3. Attach the LINK to your updated resume.

title: Freelance Accounts Administrator / Remote VA Contractor
description:
Job Title: Freelance Accounts Administrator / Remote VA Contractor



People Associates is a leading Australasian HR consultancy seeking a highly organised and detail focused freelance contractor to support our accounts administration and client onboarding processes.



This is a remote, work from home contractor role suited to someone who is confident working independently, communicates professionally, and has strong experience with Xero, client invoicing, reconciliations, and administration across multiple systems.



About the role



We are looking for someone to provide reliable accounts and administration support across a mix of direct client work and indirect channel partner accounts. The work includes new client setup, invoicing, reconciliations, and progressing leads through our systems in a timely and accurate way.



You will play an important role in ensuring our client onboarding and accounts processes run smoothly, professionally, and with a high level of care.



Key responsibilities



You will be responsible for:



setting up new clients in Xero Projects

preparing and sending Terms of Engagement to new clients by
 in a polite and professional manner

supporting client onboarding administration

reconciling accounts in Xero

preparing and issuing monthly invoices for direct clients

processing indirect channel partner accounts through Microsoft Dynamics

progressing leads by processing them through Dynamics

sending Terms of Engagement through Dynamics for signing

managing partner invoicing through Dynamics

reconciling partner invoicing with accounts recorded in Projects

maintaining accurate records and ensuring all administration is completed with excellent attention to detail



What we are looking for



The ideal contractor will have:



proven experience in accounts administration, bookkeeping support, or finance administration

strong working knowledge of Xero, including Xero Projects and reconciliations

experience using Microsoft Dynamics, or the ability to learn quickly

confidence handling invoicing across both direct and partner channels

excellent written communication skills, with the ability to write professional and courteous client
s

very strong attention to detail and accuracy

the ability to manage deadlines and work independently from home

reliability and flexibility, particularly around month end, end of week reconciliations, and occasional weekend availability



Availability



This role requires someone who can be available consistently, with particular responsiveness at busy times including:



fortnightly account reconciliations at the end of the week

month end processing

occasional weekend work when required



About People Associates



People Associates is an Australasian HR consultancy known for practical, high quality support across people, culture, leadership, and workplace matters. We work closely with clients and partners and value professionalism, responsiveness, and excellent service.



Contract arrangement



This is a freelance contractor opportunity, fully remote, with flexible work from home arrangements. We are open to discussing availability and capacity with the right person, but reliability during key billing and reconciliation periods is essential. 10 - 15 hours per week depending on volume of work, so good to accompany other work. 



To apply



Please send your CV and a brief summary of your relevant experience, including your experience with Xero, Microsoft Dynamics, invoicing, reconciliations, and remote administration support.

How To Apply:



For the subject line of your application, please do the following steps:

Go to our
 page 
 and find our website. Visit the website and find the t-shirt for sale which has a picture of Alex Pagulayan on it. The words written on the t-shirt + the word Bookkeeper will be your ‘subject line’ to write.



Attach your Portfolio



Answer these to questions:

Are you ok with being on a screenshare during your entire shift every time?

How long did you work on this night shift schedule previously? What was the schedule?

title: Freelance HR Administrator / Remote Contract VA
description:
People Associates is a leading Australasian HR consultancy seeking a highly organised and responsive freelance contractor to provide HR administration support to our consultants.



This is a remote, work from home contractor role suited to someone with strong HR administration experience, excellent written communication skills, and the ability to turn around documentation accurately and efficiently.



About the role



We are looking for a reliable freelance HR Administrator to support our consultants by preparing a range of HR documentation in a prompt, professional, and confidential manner.



A key part of this role is the ability to deliver high quality documentation with a fast turnaround. Ideally, most work would be completed within 24 hours of being requested.



The role is expected to require approximately 10 to 15 hours per week, although this may vary depending on workflow.



Key responsibilities



You will be responsible for preparing and formatting a range of HR and consulting documents, including:



without prejudice meeting invitation letters

disciplinary letters

occupational medical specialist letters

performance improvement plans

other employment relations and HR administration documentation

PowerPoint presentations for consultants and clients

proposal documents and other supporting materials



You will work closely with consultants to ensure documentation is accurate, well presented, and completed within agreed timeframes.



What we are looking for



The ideal contractor will have:



proven experience in HR administration, employment relations administration, or a similar support role

strong document drafting and formatting skills

excellent written English and a professional communication style

strong attention to detail and accuracy

the ability to handle sensitive and confidential information with discretion

confidence producing polished documents in Word and PowerPoint

strong organisational skills and the ability to manage multiple requests at once

the ability to work independently and deliver work quickly, ideally within 24 hours for most requests



Hours and availability



This is a freelance contractor opportunity for approximately 10 to 15 hours per week.



We are looking for someone who can offer flexibility and responsiveness, with availability to complete work promptly as requests arise.



About People Associates



People Associates is an Australasian HR consultancy known for practical, high quality support across people, culture, leadership, and workplace matters. We pride ourselves on being responsive, commercially grounded, and professional in everything we do.



Contract arrangement



This is a remote contractor role with flexible work from home arrangements. It would suit an experienced HR administrator or highly capable VA with relevant experience who is looking for part time freelance work with a professional consulting business.



To apply



Please send your CV and a brief summary of your relevant experience, including your background in HR administration, document preparation, and supporting consultants or senior professionals.

title: Operations Manager (Administration & Operations)

Handle inbox management,
 follow-ups and essential communication

Administration (High Standards)

Organise digital systems and internal documentation structures

Ensure all records are accurate, accessible and consistently maintained



Task & Project Coordination

Follow up to ensure completion of key actions

Ensure contracts, proposals and invoices are sent to prospects

Contracts & Compliance

Ensure documentation remains organised and up to date



Marketing & Website Support

Support preparation of marketing materials and internal documents



Requirements



Essential

Demonstrated exceptional Virtual Assistant or high-level administrative experience

Proven experience using CRM systems (e.g. HubSpot, Salesforce, Zoho or similar)

Strong understanding of lead management and pipeline tracking

Outstanding organisational and time management skills

Excellent written and verbal English communication

High attention to detail and accuracy

Ability to manage multiple responsibilities independently

Proactive mindset with the ability to anticipate needs



Preferred

Experience supporting senior leadership or founders

Experience in operations or business support roles

Experience in fast-paced or growing environments

Familiarity with reporting, dashboards and performance tracking



Why Join Niyyah Edge



Be part of a growing and ambitious organisation

Take ownership of operations and make a real impact

Work closely with leadership

A role combining operations management, CRM ownership and elite VA execution

Supportive and professional working environment



NEXT STEPS

Please submit your CV / Resume outlining your experience and suitability for the role.

title: Product Research, SEO Listings and  Customer Support on Vinted and Etsy
description:
Do you want to work on a cool fashion and e-commerce project from home, with complete autonomy?

We are looking for a creative, resourceful, and curious person to help us find products and create perfect visuals for our Vinted store using AI.



Your (daily) missions:



Use Gemini AI to research trending fashion niches using our prompts.



Get inspired via Pinterest to understand the visual universe of these niches.



Find similar items on platforms like AliExpress, Temu, and Shein.



Generate realistic and stylish photos according to our methods (we will train you on this) using Gemini AI and ChatGPT.



What we expect from you:



To be autonomous and constantly improving.



To enjoy brainstorming, getting inspired, and immersing yourself in new niches to find the most suitable products.



To be meticulous regarding the quality of the generated photos.



No need to be a design expert: if you know how to use Gemini and have a fashion view on Shein, you already have a big advantage.



Compensation:



$180 per month (7 hours a day).



Paid time off.



Opportunities for growth and evolution.



Conditions:



100% Remote work.



Flexible working hours.



Complete training with ready-to-use processes upon your arrival.



How to apply:

Send a short message explaining:

(Send a cover letter through the platform)



Hello and welcome! My name is Kyoungbu Kang. This is my TikTok channel to understand what I do: 



To move forward, I'd like to invite you to a short test.



This task is designed to test your understanding, your ability to follow instructions, and how well you interpret style and detail — not just basic execution.



Here's the full step-by-step guide for the task (Google Doc):





Here's the video where I explain everything visually:





Important Notes:

– Don't worry if it's not perfect.

– What matters most is that you do your best, follow each step carefully, and show you understand what I'm really looking for.

– If you go a little further or improve a small part: that's a big plus



 About Gemini:

The image generation step requires Gemini with image access (ideally Gemini Pro).

If you don't have Pro, try with the free version — it usually works, but with limitations.

Please let me know right away if you can't generate images, so I can find a solution.



Once you've completed the task, please send everything in one
 or message.



Send me your test by
 (you can use a Google Drive link) and also include your WhatsApp number.



Thanks again, and if your work is perfect for me, we will do a call together to explain what products I'm selling right now, and how to respond and list products on Vinted and Etsy.



There is also a possibility for evolution in salary to $300 per month for a job as a manager if you're good at your job.

title: German-Speaking Virtual Assistant for Amazon FBA Research & Reporting
description:
Important: This role requires good written German. Please only apply if you can confidently write in German.



We are a growing Amazon FBA brand based in Berlin, Germany, and we are looking for a reliable German-speaking Virtual Assistant to support us with product research, reporting, and basic Amazon operational tasks.



Main responsibilities:



1. Product research / niche analysis

- Complete structured niche analysis templates based on our internal framework

- Use tools such as Helium 10, Amazon Seller Central (including Product Opportunity Explorer), and Data Dive

- One analysis usually takes around 2 hours

- Target: at least 20 completed analyses per month



2. Reporting / KPI tracking

- Collect weekly KPI data from Amazon Seller Central, Advertising Console, and Sellerboard

- Enter all relevant numbers into Google Sheets

- There is also historical data that needs to be backfilled



3. Daily checks

- Check inventory levels daily

- Check whether all listings are live

- Create and manage Amazon Seller Support cases or tickets if needed



Optional later:

- German customer support, but without making refund or replacement decisions independently



What we are looking for:

- Very good written German

- Strong attention to detail

- Structured and reliable working style

- Good Excel / Google Sheets skills

- Ideally experience with Amazon Seller Central, Helium 10, or e-commerce reporting

- Comfortable following SOPs, videos, and written instructions



To apply, please include:

1. A short introduction in German

2. Your experience with Amazon, e-commerce, or reporting tools

3. Your level of German

4. Your hourly or monthly rate

5. A short example of a report, spreadsheet, or research task you have done before



We prefer applicants who are organized, proactive, and able to work independently with clear instructions.

title: Sales Support & Data Entry Virtual Assistant (Night Shift / PST)
description:
About GraphicLab: GraphicLab is a fast-paced promotional products company based in California. We handle big clients, big projects, and in-house screen printing and embroidery. You will act as the direct support line for our Sales Team, ensuring that our internal systems run flawlessly so our sales team can focus on client relationships.



The Role: We are seeking a highly reliable and detail-oriented Virtual Assistant to manage the critical backend data of our sales process. You will be responsible for taking quotes and
ed instructions from our California team and ensuring it is accurately entered into our CRM.



Key Responsibilities:



Data Entry & CRM Management: Accurately enter new jobs and orders into our CRM system (CommonSKU) for different sales representatives.



Quoting Support: Assist in building and organizing quotes for new jobs based on provided pricing parameters.



Order Tracking: Monitor the status of jobs by checking in with production schedules and external vendors.



Logistics: Compile and organize shipping/tracking information to be sent to clients.



Communication: Maintain clear, daily communication with the California-based Sales Team to provide end-of-shift progress reports.



Requirements:



Flawless English (Written more than Spoken): You must be able to write clear, professional
s and CRM communications. You will also attend virtual meetings once a week with our internal team and occasionally with our customers.



Attention to Detail: You must be highly diligent; a single typo in a SKU number or choosing the wrong color can cost the company money.



Shift Requirement: You must be available to work the US Pacific Standard Time (PST) shift to overlap with our California office (8:30 AM - 4:30 PM PST).



Tech-Savvy: Familiarity with CRM systems is a plus, but a strong general ability to learn new software quickly is required (MS Office, Google Workspace, Adobe, etc.).



How to Apply:



Submit your resume.



Include a brief cover letter explaining your experience with data entry or CRM management.



A 1 or 2 Minute Camera Loom Video: In this video, please introduce yourself, briefly mention your CRM experience, your background working as a VA on the night shift, and answer this scenario:

If a vendor
s you to say a shipment of 500 shirts is delayed by 3 days, what are the exact steps you take to update our system and notify our California sales team?

title: Junior Publishing Operations Manager
description:
We are an independent non-fiction publishing house based in Europe, publishing practical books for educated adults. We operate across multiple series and pen names, with a growing catalogue on Amazon KDP.



We are looking for a sharp, organised, and self-directed individual to grow into a full publishing operations role. You will start with structured, well-documented tasks and take on more responsibility as you demonstrate competence and judgement.



This is a long-term position. We invest in the right person.



What You Will Do



Initially:

- Publishing uploads and metadata management on Amazon KDP

- Administrative support across our Notion-based project management system

- ARC and review outreach via
 and
 Messenger

- Basic reporting on sales, reviews, and ad performance



As you develop:

- Niche and keyword research using Helium 10

-
 Ads and Amazon Ads management

- AI-assisted writing and editing support

- Liaison with editors and contractors

- Cover design and formatting support for straightforward projects



What We Are Looking For

- Exceptional written English — C2 level, non-negotiable

- High attention to detail and genuine process discipline

- Comfortable working independently from written SOPs and documentation

- Curious about books, publishing, and the business behind writing

- Willing to learn unfamiliar tools systematically

- Reliable, honest, and direct in communication



Publishing experience is a plus but not required. 

Intelligence and work ethic matter more than a specific CV.



Practical Details

- Full-time, 8 hours per day

- Remote, working with an operator across European time zones

- Salary: open to discussion based on experience and demonstrated capability

- Start date: flexible, Q2 or Q3 2026



How to Apply



Send a short message — no more than three paragraphs — explaining why this role interests you and what in your background is most relevant. Include one specific example of a time you followed a complex written process or learned a new system independently.



Applications that do not answer the question will not be considered.

title: Search Engine Optimization Guru
description:

While we have a powerful story to share—including a wide range of video testimonials—we recognize that SEO is a key area where we need expertise.

If this sounds like a fit for you, we would love to connect. Please let me know.

title: Social Media Content Creator & Video Editor Needed (Luxury Villa)
description:

If you live and breathe TikTok, Reels, Instagram, and YouTube shorts, then this job is for you. We need a creative social media specialist who understands "hook" culture, fast-paced transitions, and how to make content go viral. Someone who stays ahead of trends and knows exactly which song or effect will make a video pop. Someone who will create and manage engaging content for a luxury villa, turning raw clips into fast-paced, cinematic, high-retention videos.

What I’m Looking For:

• Fast-paced, engaging editing (no boring cuts)

• Strong hook in the first 1–2 seconds

• Smooth, cinematic transitions

• Perfect sync with music and sound effects

• Ability to create curiosity and a luxury feel

Responsibilities:

• Create short-form videos (Instagram/FB Reels, TikTok, Shorts)

• Develop and manage a simple content calendar

• Post and engage with followers and manage our social media pages

• Stay on top of trends

Project Details:

• Starting with 1 video per week 

• Potential for long-term work

• Raw clips/photos will be provided (Google Drive access)

Creative Direction:

• Focus on promoting the villa (especially the complimentary rooftop breakfast) facing Mount Kenya, we only villa that can offer that in the resort

• Style: energetic, fast-paced, cinematic content

• Clean color grading, subtle effects, smooth flow

Requirements:

• Experience with social media content

• Strong video editing skills

• Reliable communication and deadlines

To Apply:

• Share samples of your work (video ads)

• Your price per video

• Brief description of your workflow

title: Division Controller (Remote|Independent Contractor)
description:
Division Controller (Remote|Independent Contractor) 



About Meiborg: 



As an industry leading logistics company, Meiborg provides safe and reliable transportation services to a diverse group of customers throughout the United States. With a reputation of providing only the best in transportation and warehousing, our professional customer support staff deliver the highest levels of efficiency and performance for our customers. 



The Division Controller is responsible for the integrity of the financials, forecast, and budgets over three business units (Meiborg Logistics, Meiborg Warehousing, Enterprise Diesel Solutions).  Duties include working with business unit leaders, driving growth and profitability for each division.  Compiling financial reports based on financial statements and implementing policies and procedures for financial reporting. Ensure that internal controls are in place to protect assets, ensure the integrity of our financial statements, and facilitate the effective operation of all business functions.  



 Essential Responsibilities: 



• Manage all accounting operations for each of the respective business units

• Manage the forecast and budgeting process for each business unit

• Prepare customer mix margin reports vs forecast

• Proforma potential new warehousing buildings and calculate ROI

• Preparing pricing for customer request for pricing using in-house pricing models

• Perform monthly financial close functions and statement preparation

• Ensure quality control over financial transactions and financial reporting

• Perform general ledger analysis and reconciliation 

• Oversee activities to ensure the accurate and timely management of billing 

• Post accruals monthly, quarterly, and yearly  

• Plan and participate in annual financial budget process 

• Weekly ad hoc reporting 

• All other duties and projects as assigned 



Job Requirements: 



• Years of Experience: Minimum 5 years’ accounting and finance experience

• Education: bachelor’s degree, required; master’s degree preferred

• Ability to lead and train others 

• Proven experience as a Controller 

• Accounting managerial experience required 

• Excellent account software user and administration skills 

• Trucking industry experience a plus 

• Excellent verbal and written communication skills 

• CPA and/or other professional certifications  and US GAAP Proficient

• Advanced skills in Microsoft Excel and related accounting software 

• Excellent analytical skills 

• Full-time: 40 hours/week

• Schedule: Monday- Friday, 8:00 AM – 5:00 PM CST

• Contractual role (Independent Contractor)

• Ongoing, long-term opportunity based on performance and business needs



Pay: Based on education, experience, and credentials.

 

If you’re interested in applying for the Division Controller position, please send your application to 
 you!

title: Real Estate Data Manager (Deal Pipelines & Markets)
description:

You will be responsible for how data enters and fuels real deal pipelines.



What You’ll Manage (DATA ONLY)

Pre foreclosure

Probate

Lis Pendens

Tax Delinquent

Sheriff Sales

Clean, standardize, and deduplicate records

Validate ownership and property data



Run skip tracing (phones/emails)



Remove bad data and incomplete records

Ensure all data is accurate, clean, and ready for outreach



Data Extraction & Scraping

Manage and monitor data scraping bots/tools

Ensure consistent and accurate automated data pulls

Troubleshoot scraping issues when they break



Perform manual scraping when needed:

Probate

Pre foreclosure

Sheriff Sales

County-specific sources

You must be comfortable with automation + manual execution



Your Role

Own the data sourcing process (automated + manual)



Turn raw data into actionable prospect lists

Enter and organize data inside:

DataSift

SmartContact

SmrtPhone



Analyze markets using DataSift Identify high-performing zip codes, counties, and list types

Track which data sources generate real deals



Maintain consistent data flow into the pipeline

Improve list quality over time





KPI & Performance Analysis



Track:

Contact rate by list/source

% of valid phone numbers

Data accuracy rate

List-to-lead conversion (support metric)

Identify:



Best-performing markets

Underperforming data sources

Dashboards & Reporting

Report on:



Pipeline data health

Lead flow by source

Market performance trends



Recommend:



Where to focus

What to eliminate





What You DO NOT Do



You do NOT call leads

You do NOT follow up with sellers

You do NOT manage lead stages or tagging

Lead Managers handle all communication and follow-up

You focus on data, systems, and insights



What Makes This Role Different

Work inside real US deal pipelines



Your work directly impacts real acquisitions

Structured systems + SOPs

Long-term role with growth~~~~~~~~~





Requirements

CRM experience (GoHighLevel, Podio, etc.)



Experience with:



Data scraping (tools or manual)



Data cleaning & deduplication

Skip tracing

Familiar with:

DataSift

SmartContact / SmrtPhone



Strong with:



Google Sheets / Excel

Data organization

Fast and reliable

Share a dashboard or report you’ve created.~~~~~~~~



Do you prefer working with data or talking to leads? 



Why?





To apply:



Include the word PIPELINE!



Only with Download Mbps & Upload Mbps Screenshot.



Do you have a consistent connection over 100 Mbps?



List CRM/tools used



Send a 30-sec voice intro~~~~~~



We are not hiring a lead manager



We are hiring the person who makes lead managers successful!

title: Customer Services Sales Rep
description:
This role focuses on prospecting, lead generation, outbound sales, appointment setting, follow-up, and helping move qualified prospects through the sales pipeline. The ideal candidate understands B2B sales, communicates professionally, and is comfortable working in a performance-based environment where compensation is tied to closed business and account growth.



The Sales Agent will help identify companies that ship freight, introduce the broker’s services, uncover shipping pain points, and position the brokerage as a reliable transportation partner. This role is critical in helping the freight broker secure new customers, increase freight volume, and build recurring revenue.



Key Responsibilities



Lead Generation and Prospecting

 • Research and identify shippers, manufacturers, distributors, wholesalers, importers, exporters, and other businesses with freight needs.

 • Build prospect lists using online databases, load boards, LinkedIn, Google, industry directories, and CRM tools.

 • Qualify leads based on shipping volume, lanes, commodity type, urgency, and fit for brokerage services.

 • Maintain a consistent outbound call,
, and follow-up schedule.



Sales Support

 • Reach out to prospective customers by phone,
, and other approved channels to introduce freight services.

 • Set appointments and discovery calls for the freight broker with decision-makers such as shipping managers, logistics coordinators, warehouse managers, and operations directors.

 • Ask qualifying questions to understand current shipping methods, pain points, rates, service issues, and carrier challenges.

 • Present the value of the brokerage, including service reliability, communication, coverage, pricing support, and problem-solving ability.

 • Assist in reactivating dormant accounts and past leads.



Customer Acquisition

 • Help the freight broker secure new accounts by nurturing leads from first contact through onboarding.

 • Coordinate collection of key onboarding information such as shipment types, freight lanes, equipment needs, billing contacts, and shipment frequency.

 • Support the preparation of sales materials, rate quotes, capability statements, and customer presentations.

 • Follow up on quotes, proposals, and introductory conversations to increase close rates.



Relationship Building

 • Build trust with prospects and customers through responsive, professional communication.

 • Maintain regular contact with leads until they are ready to move freight.

 • Assist with account management communications after onboarding to strengthen retention and repeat business.

 • Escalate customer issues, objections, or special opportunities to the freight broker quickly.



CRM and Reporting

 • Update CRM or sales tracking tools with all calls,
s, notes, follow-up tasks, and account status changes.

 • Track lead sources, pipeline stages, booked appointments, closed accounts, and recurring shipper activity.

 • Provide weekly reports on outreach activity, qualified leads, appointments set, and revenue opportunities.

 • Help maintain an organized pipeline to ensure no prospect is neglected.



Market Awareness

 • Stay informed about freight market conditions, shipping trends, common equipment types, and logistics terminology.

 • Learn the broker’s service offerings, preferred lanes, target industries, and customer profile.

 • Monitor competitor positioning and customer concerns related to pricing, service failures, capacity, and communication.



Day-to-Day Duties

 • Make outbound calls to prospective shippers.

 • Send cold
s and follow-up messages.

 • Qualify inbound and outbound leads.

 • Schedule meetings for the freight broker.

 • Maintain CRM accuracy.

 • Follow up on quotes and pending opportunities.

 • Assist with onboarding new shipper accounts.

 • Support retention and upsell efforts when needed.



Required Qualifications

 • Experience in sales, lead generation, appointment setting, customer service, or business development.

 • Strong phone presence and persuasive communication skills.

 • Ability to speak confidently with business owners, logistics managers, and operations personnel.

 • Organized and self-directed with strong follow-up habits.

 • Comfortable working under performance expectations and commission-based compensation.

 • Basic understanding of freight brokerage, trucking, logistics, dispatch, shipping, or supply chain terminology is preferred.

 • Ability to use
, spreadsheets, CRM systems, and online research tools.



Preferred Qualifications

 • Previous experience in freight brokerage, trucking, dispatch, logistics sales, or transportation coordination.

 • Existing knowledge of FTL, LTL, reefer, flatbed, drayage, or dedicated freight services.

 • Familiarity with shipper prospecting and B2B cold outreach.

 • Experience working with U.S. customers and business communication standards.

 • Proven ability to convert leads into long-term customer accounts.



Key Skills

 • Cold calling

 • Lead qualification

 • Appointment setting

 • B2B sales

 • Relationship management

 • Negotiation support

 • Follow-up discipline

 • CRM management

 • Written and verbal communication

 • Time management

 • Objection handling

 • Freight/logistics industry awareness



Performance Metrics / KPIs

 • Number of outbound calls per day or week

 • Number of
s and follow-ups sent

 • Number of qualified leads generated

 • Number of appointments booked

 • Number of shipper accounts onboarded

 • Revenue generated from closed customers

 • Freight loads booked from acquired customers

 • Customer retention and repeat shipping activity

 • Pipeline conversion rate



Compensation Structure

This role is performance and experience based with pay up to but not limited to 30dollars an hour

title: Looking for experienced inbound SDR
description:
About Us

We build B2B sales systems for clients across Europe using cold
 and LinkedIn outreach. We combine positioning, offer design, and case studies with AI research, personalisation, and automation to generate predictable, high-quality pipeline. We deliver value before we ask for a meeting.



The Role

We're looking for an SDR to convert positive replies from cold
 and LinkedIn into confirmed, qualified meetings. You're not closing deals, your job ends when a qualified decision-maker shows up to a scheduled call. Day-to-day you'll be managing reply inboxes, qualifying interest, handling objections to booking, confirming meetings, and recovering no-shows.



What We Need From You

English C1/C2 - written and spoken, peer-level with C-suite

1-3 years of B2B sales experience with proven results

Experience booking meetings via cold
 and/or LinkedIn (Instantly experience is a plus)

Comfortable making short calls via WhatsApp for warm prospects, confirmations, and no-show recovery

Self-directed - you plan your own day and hit your numbers without being chased

Available to work in CET timezone

Professional home setup: quiet space, camera-ready for internal check-ins

Self-employed and able to invoice



What You'll Be Responsible For

Booking 20+ qualified meetings per month with ICP-matched decision-makers

Sending meeting confirmations within 10 minutes of booking and reminders 1–2 hours before calls

Keeping no-show rate below 20% and rebooking 30%+ of no-shows within 5 days

Completing a qualification brief for every booked meeting before the call

Keeping the CRM fully updated same day, every day

Submitting a weekly pipeline report on time



Key KPIs

20+ qualified attended meetings/month

80%+ show-up rate

Under 30 min response time to prospect replies during working hours

100% of meetings have a completed handoff brief

100% of leads updated in CRM same day



Compensation

Hours: 15-25 hrs/week (part-time to start, scales with results)

Base rate: $2-4/hr (negotiable based on experience)

Commission: $15 per qualified attended meeting booked by you

Estimated OTE: $400–$500/month at part-time hours (no cap on commission)

Invoicing: monthly, paid within 5 business days



60-Day Review

After 60 days we review hours, commission rate, and scope together. If results are strong, full-time is a real possibility.



To Apply

Please include specific examples of meetings you've booked through cold outreach, your average show-up rate if you have it, and a short note on how you manage your day when working remotely without supervision.

title: Amazon Sourcer
description:
ONLINE ARBITRAGE

Looking to grow our team! Seeking one part-time position that will undergo a trial period of one week, paid before being brought on as part-time.



We are more than an Amazon arbitrage (OA) business. If you seek a long-term, advancing position, this is for you.



PSA

We have systems in place to ensure we don’t bring on any bad actors. If you plan on sending us leads that are being shared across other businesses or you are pulling items off of a leads list, you will be let go immediately.



We are seeking a part time product sourcer who can grow in our company and later be promoted to a higher paid managerial role. If you are not a hard worker and can’t prove it to us over our interview process, don’t even bother completing this application.



Job Responsibilities

Tasked with sourcing in-stock 3-6 leads a day.



Follow up, build and maintain SOPs.



Requirements

Keepa experience required

Seller Amp (SAS) experience

Online Arbitrage experience

Familiar with manual, reverse/storefront stalking, keepa product finder

Understanding ROI, margin and sales rank

Ability to work part time (20 hours per week)

Reliable internet Compensation & Benefits

Unlimited PTO

Holidays Off

Bonuses which will be discussed

Communication Skills



This should be simple, we're looking for people who don't need much supervision. Someone that is dependable and eager to work. We know this is a very competitive market and we are looking for a rockstar tea
mber we can rely on for years and years to come. We need someone who pays attention to detail and understands how to properly read data. We expect the majority of the items to be shared with our team to be purchasable and pass all of our SOP checks.  Loyalty is the most important thing to our team. We're looking for people who want to stay with us long term and can see themselves in management /senior roles. If you've read this far, congratulations as I've found out many don't. Please put your favorite fruit as the title of your application.

Furthermore, we will not be accepting any candidates who already work for another client as we need exclusivity. 
 will be required for team communications.



If you want your application expedited please send over 3 leads researched from the same day of your application.

Include Supplier Link & Amazon US link.

This is our criteria.

Low sales rank

Minimum 30% ROI

Keepa chart shows low odds of going below break even price



In addition please answer the following questions in your application submission.

Have you been previously employed to be an online arbitrage sourcer?

If so, why did you leave your current candidate?

How many monitors do you have?

Why should we choose you as one of our candidates?

What is your favorite sport and why ?  

Do you have a Seller Amp and Keepa subscription?



Thanks for taking the time out of your day to apply, best of luck!

title: Sales VA (Calls + Instagram)
description:
**Title:** Sales VA (Calls + Instagram) | Base + Bonuses (Earn $700 to $900 per month)



We are a premium boutique fitness studio in Houston looking for a full-time **Sales Virtual Assistant** to help us convert leads into paid intro offers.



This is a performance-based role. If you are motivated and follow our system, you can earn well above the base salary.



What You Will Do



* Call new leads within minutes of inquiry

* Send SMS follow-ups to convert leads into purchases

* Respond to Instagram DMs and engage new followers

* Handle inbound calls and guide clients to purchase

* Follow a proven script to sell our intro offer



Your Main Goal



Convert leads into paid intro offers



You are not selling high-ticket memberships.

You are helping people take the first step.



Compensation



* $500 per month (full-time, 40 hours per week)

* $2 per intro sold

* Top performers typically earn $700 to $900 per month



What We Are Looking For



* Strong spoken and written English

* Confident and friendly communication

* Comfortable asking for the sale

* Fast response time (very important)

* Coachable and able to follow scripts

* Reliable and consistent



This Job Is Not For You If



* You are slow to respond to messages

* You do not like talking on the phone

* You wait for instructions instead of taking action

* You avoid asking people to make a decision



This Job Is For You If



* You like hitting targets and goals

* You enjoy talking to people and helping them get started

* You can follow a system and improve quickly

* You want to grow long-term with a company



Important: How to Apply



To be considered, you must follow these steps:



1. Include the word “STRONGER” at the top of your application

2. Answer this question:

   How would you respond to this message?

   “Hi, I’m interested but I need to think about it.”

3. Send a 30-second voice recording introducing yourself



Applications that do not follow instructions will be ignored.



We are looking for someone reliable, motivated, and ready to grow with us long-term.



If that is you, apply now.

title: Cold Caller / Appointment Setter (Fluent English Required) – Base + Performance Pay
description:
Overview:

We are a U.S.-based AI automation agency helping local businesses capture missed calls and turn them into booked appointments automatically.



We are hiring a results-driven cold caller / appointment setter whose ONLY job is to generate booked appointments.



If you are not comfortable calling businesses daily and handling rejection, do NOT apply.



Compensation:



Base Pay: $400/month

$10–$30 per booked appointment

$50–$200 per closed deal



Top performers can earn significantly more. This is a performance-based role.



Your Role (What You Will Actually Do):



Call U.S. local businesses (leads provided daily)

Speak directly with business owners or decision-makers

Follow a script while sounding natural and confident

Handle objections and keep conversations moving

Book qualified appointments on our calendar

Log all activity in CRM after each call



Daily Expectations:



50–100+ outbound calls per day

Consistent follow-ups with leads

Minimum: 1 booked appointment per week

Target: 3–5+ booked appointments per week



Failure to meet minimum performance will result in replacement.



Required Skills (Do NOT apply if you don’t meet these):



Fluent, clear English with strong speaking ability

Proven cold calling or appointment setting experience

Confident handling objections (not afraid of rejection)

High energy and ability to control conversations

Reliable internet + quiet working environment

Ability to work consistently and hit daily targets



Preferred (Strong Advantage):



Experience calling U.S. businesses

Sales or closing experience

Experience in home services, med spas, or local businesses



How to Apply (MANDATORY – Applications without this will be ignored):



Send a 30–60 second voice recording introducing yourself

Answer: How many calls per day have you handled before?

Record yourself reading this script:



“Hi, is this the owner?

Quick question — are you currently handling missed calls and bookings manually, or do you have a system in place for that?”



Record yourself responding to this objection:



“We’re not interested.”



Important:

This is a performance role, not a passive job.

We are looking for someone who wants to grow, earn more through commissions, and stay long-term.



If you can consistently produce results, there is opportunity for higher pay and leadership roles.



Apply only if you are confident on the phone and ready to perform.
