title: TIer 1 Helpdesk Technician
description:
Position Summary



We are a small managed service provider (MSP) looking for a Tier 1 Helpdesk Technician to serve as the first point of contact for our clients’ end users. You’ll handle incoming support requests, resolve common issues on first contact, and ensure that more complex problems are clearly documented and escalated to senior technicians. Because we’re a small team, you’ll interact directly with clients, learn quickly across multiple environments, and play a key role in delivering a great support experience.



Essential Duties and Responsibilities



Front-Line Support



• Answer incoming calls,
s, and tickets; log all requests accurately in the PSA/ticketing system (Superops)

• Perform initial triage — gather symptoms, identify urgency, and resolve straightforward issues on first contact when possible

• Handle common requests: password resets, MFA setup, account unlocks, new-user onboarding/offboarding,
 and calendar issues, printer troubleshooting, and basic software installs

• Walk end users through solutions clearly and patiently, adapting communication style to non-technical audiences

• Ensure tickets are thoroughly documented with symptoms, steps taken, and resolution or escalation notes before closing or handing off



Basic Troubleshooting



• Troubleshoot common workstation, laptop, and peripheral issues across Windows 10/11 and macOS environments

• Perform basic user account management in Active Directory and Microsoft 365 (password resets, group membership changes, license assignment)

• Diagnose straightforward network connectivity problems such as Wi-Fi issues, VPN connection failures, and basic DNS troubleshooting

• Use RMM tools (Superops) to run remote sessions, push basic scripts, and verify patch status

• Follow existing SOPs and knowledge base articles to resolve known issues consistently

Escalation and Communication

• Recognize when an issue exceeds Tier 1 scope and escalate promptly with clear, detailed notes to Tier 2 or senior technicians

• Communicate status updates to end users on open tickets, keeping clients informed throughout the resolution process

• Flag recurring issues or patterns to senior staff so root-cause analysis can be initiated



MSP Operations



• Manage and prioritize your own ticket queue across multiple clients, meeting or exceeding SLA response targets

• Contribute to and maintain client-specific documentation, SOPs, and knowledge base articles in the company documentation platform (Hudu)

• Assist with basic onboarding tasks for new clients — inventorying assets, documenting user lists, and setting up monitoring agents

• Coordinate with vendors and third-party providers for basic account or service inquiries when directed

• Assist senior technicians with project work as needed: workstation imaging, peripheral setup, and on-site support



REQUIRED QUALIFICATIONS



•      Excellent English Language Skills, both written and verbal

•	1+ year of hands-on IT support experience (helpdesk, desktop support, or internship); MSP exposure is a plus

•	Basic working knowledge of Windows 10/11, macOS, and Microsoft 365 (Outlook, Teams, OneDrive, SharePoint)

•	Familiarity with Active Directory basics: password resets, account unlocks, group membership

•	General understanding of networking concepts: IP addressing, DNS, DHCP, Wi-Fi, and VPN connectivity

•	Experience using a ticketing or helpdesk system in a professional setting

•	Strong communication skills — comfortable speaking directly with clients ranging from small business owners to office staff

•	Ability to manage multiple open tickets and context-switch effectively throughout the day

•	Self-motivated, dependable, and eager to learn; you’ll receive mentorship but should be comfortable taking initiative



Preferred Qualifications

•	CompTIA A+ certification (or actively pursuing)

•	Experience working in an MSP or multi-client environment

•	Familiarity with an RMM platform (Superops, ConnectWise, Datto, NinjaOne, or similar)

•	Exposure to basic Microsoft 365 administration (user/license management, mailbox troubleshooting)

•	Interest in networking, security, or cloud technologies and a desire to grow into more advanced roles

•	Experience with documentation tools or knowledge base platforms

title: Medical/Health Copywriter - Blog Article Review (Supplement Brand)
description:
We're a cognitive performance brand looking for an experienced medical/health copywriter to review and edit pre-written blog articles about supplements, nootropics, sleep, focus, and wellness.



The Work:

  - Review blog articles in Microsoft Word using Track Changes

  - Ensure the writing sounds natural, compelling, and human - not like AI-generated content. If a sentence sounds robotic, generic, or formulaic, rewrite it.

  - Check for medical compliance (no "treat/cure/prevent" claims - we're a dietary supplement)

  - Fix factual inaccuracies, awkward phrasing, and grammar issues

  - Improve weak hooks, flat transitions, and sections that feel like filler

  - Ensure consistent brand voice: think "Harvard neuroscientist writing for GQ" - smart, direct, authoritative, but never preachy or salesy

  - Do NOT rewrite full articles or change structure - edit at the sentence and paragraph level



What We're Looking For in Edits:

  - Does every paragraph earn its place? Cut filler.

  - Does the opening hook grab you in the first two sentences?

  - Are claims backed by the sources cited in the article?

  - Would you actually want to read this? If a section is boring, fix it.

  - Does it sound like a real expert wrote it, or does it sound like a content mill?



Details:

  - Articles are provided as Word docs with detailed review instructions included

  - We'll start with a paid trial batch of 25 articles

  - If the quality is good, there are 650+ additional articles to review

  - Each article is 1,500-2,000 words

  - Topics include: magnesium/sleep, caffeine alternatives, nootropic supplements, nicotine pouch comparisons, ADHD/focus, anxiety, productivity



Ideal Candidate:

  - Experience writing or editing health/supplement/wellness content

  - Strong editorial instincts - you can tell when writing sounds "off" or AI-generated

  - Understands FDA dietary supplement labeling rules (what you can and can't claim)

  - Strong English grammar and editing skills

  - Comfortable using Track Changes in Microsoft Word

  - Attention to detail - we need quality, not speed



To Apply:

  Please include a sample of health/supplement content you've written or edited, and briefly describe your experience with medical/health compliance in content.

title: Founding AI Ecommerce Growth Operator
description:
Founding AI Ecommerce Growth Operator



About the Role

You will be responsible for finding winning products, researching competitors, building and optimizing stores, using AI tools to create and test content, supporting paid ads, and helping manage day-to-day store operations.



This role is ideal for someone who is entrepreneurial, proactive, organized, and comfortable owning results.

Experience building or managing Shopify stores

Strong product research ability

Familiarity with Kalodata or similar tools

Familiarity with Meta Ads Manager

Working knowledge of Google Ads

Strong English writing and copy skills

Strong AI tool fluency

Affiliate revenue

First-sale speed

Weekly reporting quality

title: Full-Time Video Editor — Multi-Brand YouTube & Social (AI-Native | Long-Form + Repurposing)
description:
ABOUT US

We are a growing entrepreneurial organization operating multiple brands, YouTube channels, and social media platforms. Our content spans financial education, wealth strategy, personal development, and lifestyle — and we're built for scale.

Our brands include:



LIFE180 — a philosophy-first financial education platform with 1,000+ contracted agents nationwide

ThriveHive Show — a personal development and lifestyle YouTube channel

Additional brand content across Instagram,
, and TikTok

ZARIA Eco Hotel & Retreat Center 
 on Instagram



We produce long-form educational content, keynote and event coverage, podcast-style conversations, and short-form repurposed clips — consistently, across multiple channels. This is not a one-channel side project. This is a full-time creative role inside a real operation with real 
ntum.



THIS IS A CAREER OPPORTUNITY, NOT A GIG

We are looking for one dedicated, full-time person who wants to grow with us long-term. Our last editor was with us for eight years. We don't hire and rotate — we invest in the right person and build together. You will never be bored. You will always have work. And you will be part of something actively expanding.

This role is exclusive. You will work for us full-time and will not take on other clients while in this role.



WHAT THIS ROLE ACTUALLY IS

This is not a "cut and export" editing job. You are responsible for two things equally:



Producing polished long-form YouTube videos that represent a high-end personal brand

Independently identifying and creating short-form clips from that same content — Reels, Shorts, and TikToks — without being told exactly where to cut



That second part is the harder part. Our content covers financial philosophy, wealth strategy, and personal development. You need to watch a 45-minute video and know which 60-second 
nt will stop someone mid-scroll. That requires genuine English comprehension — not just following instructions, but understanding nuance, emotion, and context.

Repurposing is not a bonus task. It is a core deliverable. Every long-form video requires a minimum of 3–5 short-form clips delivered alongside it.



ENGLISH COMPREHENSION — NON-NEGOTIABLE

Our content is conceptually dense. You don't need to be an expert in finance or personal development — but you need to understand it well enough to:



Identify the most compelling 
nts in a long video on your own

Write or suggest captions and on-screen text that capture the idea accurately

Know the difference between a 
nt that sounds good and one that actually means something



If you need to be told exactly where every clip starts and ends, this role is not for you.



YOUR RESPONSIBILITIES



Receive raw footage + brief and deliver a polished rough cut within 24 hours

Full post-production: cuts, color grading, captions, music, motion graphics, lower thirds

Independently generate 3–5 short-form clips per long-form video using AI tools

Maintain consistent brand visual language across all channels and content types

Deliver YouTube thumbnails (bonus but preferred)

Manage your own time and communicate proactively — no micromanagement here, but daily communication is a must



REQUIRED SKILLS



3+ years editing long-form YouTube content (talking head, podcast-style, educational)

Adobe Premiere Pro or DaVinci Resolve as your primary editor (specify which in your application)

Active daily use of AI editing tools — Descript, OpusClip, Captions.ai, Submagic, or equivalent

Strong motion graphics capability — lower thirds, intros, outros, text animations

Strong English comprehension — you must understand context, not just follow timestamps



Bonus Skills:



YouTube thumbnail creation

Canva proficiency


 review workflow experience



HOW WE WORK



You receive raw footage via Google Drive with a short brief or Loom walkthrough

Rough cut delivered within 24 hours

Review and feedback via 
 (time-stamped comments)

One standard revision round

Final export + short-form clips delivered together



TO APPLY, YOU MUST INCLUDE ALL THREE OF THE FOLLOWING:



-  A link to at least one YouTube channel you have edited for (long-form content preferred)

-  Answer this question in 3–4 sentences: What AI tools do you currently use in your editing workflow, and specifically how do   you use them?

-  Answer this question in 3–4 sentences: Watch any recent video on the LIFE180 YouTube channel 
  What is the core idea being communicated, and what 30-second 
nt would you pull as a short-form clip — and why?

-  How can you see yourself adding value to what we are creating.  We are seeking someone who wants the opportunity to expand in the next couple of years as the company continues to grow.  3-4 sentences.



Applications that do not answer both questions will not be reviewed.



For the remaining fields on the form:



Wage/Salary: $800 / Month

Hours per week: 40

Business or Contact Name: Revan Vega - LIFE180

title: Guest Posting & Blogger Outreach Specialist
description:
The Guest Posting & Blogger Outreach Specialist is responsible for building high-quality backlinks and increasing brand visibility through strategic outreach, relationship building, and content placement on reputable blogs, media platforms, and industry websites. This role plays a key part in improving SEO performance, domain authority, and online presence.



Key Responsibilities:



Blogger Outreach & Relationship Management



- Identify and research relevant bloggers, publishers, influencers, and website owners within target industries.

- Conduct outreach campaigns via
 and social platforms to secure guest posting opportunities.

- Build and maintain long-term relationships with blog owners and digital publishers.

- Negotiate guest post placements, collaborations, and content partnerships.

- Maintain an organized outreach database and contact lists.



Guest Posting & Link Building



- Secure high-quality guest post placements on authoritative websites.

- Coordinate with content writers to ensure articles meet publisher guidelines.

- Ensure backlinks meet SEO best practices and company standards.

- Monitor live links and verify successful publication.

- Track link-building performance and domain authority improvements.



Content Coordination



- Develop guest post topics aligned with SEO strategy and brand messaging.

- Review content to ensure quality, originality, and relevance.

- Collaborate with SEO and marketing teams on keyword targeting.

- Ensure anchor text distribution follows SEO guidelines.



SEO & Reporting



- Perform competitor backlink analysis.

- Track outreach success rates and campaign performance.

- Prepare weekly or monthly outreach and backlink reports.

- Use SEO tools to evaluate website authority and link quality.



Qualifications



- Bachelor’s degree in Marketing, Communications, Journalism, or related field preferred.

- 2+ years experience in guest posting, link building, or blogger outreach.

- Strong understanding of SEO and off-page optimization strategies.

- Excellent written communication and

title: Legal Assistant / Paralegal
description:
The Law Office of Natlie Figgers is seeking a highly organized and detail-oriented Legal Assistant / Paralegal to support daily legal operations. The ideal candidate will assist attorneys with case preparation, legal documentation, client communication, and administrative support. This role requires strong organizational skills, professionalism, and the ability to manage multiple tasks in a fast-paced legal environment.



Key Responsibilities:



- Assist attorneys with case preparation, legal research, and document drafting.

- May prepare, proofread, and file legal documents such as pleadings, motions, contracts, and correspondence.

- Maintain and organize client files, case records, and legal documentation.

- Handle calls.

- Communicate with clients regarding case updates, document requests, and scheduling.

- Manage attorney calendars, schedule meetings, hearings, and appointments.

- Coordinate with courts, opposing counsel, and other legal professionals.

- Assist in preparing materials for court hearings, depositions, and trials.

- Ensure all legal documents comply with court requirements and deadlines.

- Perform general administrative tasks, including
 management, filing, and data entry.



Qualifications:

- Associate or Bachelor’s degree in Paralegal Studies, Legal Studies, or related field preferred.

- Previous experience as a Legal Assistant or Paralegal with US Law Firms is preferred.

- Strong knowledge of legal terminology and court procedures.

- Excellent written and verbal communication skills.

- Proficiency in Microsoft Office and legal case management software

- Strong attention to detail and organizational skills.

- Ability to maintain confidentiality and professionalism at all times.



Preferred Skills:

- Tech Savvy is a must

- Experience with legal document management systems.

- Familiarity with litigation procedures and court filings.

- Experience supporting attorneys in family law, personal injury, civil, corporate, or litigation matters.

title: PARKED INNOVATIONS | DWELL BEHIND THE SHIELD PROGRAM  NOW HIRING — SPONSORSHIP OUTREACH VIRTUAL ASSISTANT
description:
Pay: $5.00/hr + 8% Commission + Performance Bonuses



Hours: 20 hrs/week | Monday–Friday | 9:00 AM–1:00 PM PDT



Type: Part-Time | Independent Contractor | Long-Term



ABOUT PARKED INNOVATIONS & THE DWELL BEHIND THE SHIELD PROGRAM



Parked Innovations is a US-based company operating the Dwell Behind the Shield program — a national initiative that provides vehicle dash privacy shields to individuals and families enrolled in safe parking programs across the United States. Our mission is to protect the privacy, safety, and dignity of vehicle-dwelling Americans while connecting purpose-driven brands to a meaningful sponsorship opportunity.



We are expanding our sponsorship program and are looking for a results-driven, high-energy Sponsorship Outreach VA to help us grow. Your primary focus will be targeting Shark Tank alumni companies — brands that already understand mission-driven marketing, ROI, and the power of community impact.



ABOUT THE ROLE



As our Sponsorship Outreach VA you will be the first point of contact between Parked Innovations and our prospective sponsors. You will research, reach out to, and pitch Shark Tank alumni brands on becoming official Dwell Behind the Shield sponsors. This role is part outreach specialist, part relationship builder, and part closer.



WHAT YOU WILL BE DOING



 - Research and build targeted prospect lists of Shark Tank alumni companies using LinkedIn, company websites, and public databases



 - Send personalized cold outreach
s to founders, CMOs, and marketing directors on behalf of Parked Innovations



 - Make follow-up calls to prospects using Aircall from a dedicated US phone number



 - Leave professional voi
s and send follow-up
s using our proven 5-step outreach sequence



 - Pitch Dwell Behind the Shield sponsorship tiers confidently and handle objections professionally



 - Book discovery calls and present sponsorship opportunities to warm leads



 - Manage and update the Zoho CRM pipeline daily with all call and
 activity



 - Send a brief end-of-shift report every day covering calls made,
s sent, and pipeline updates



 - Attend a weekly 30-minute video check-in with the Parked Innovation tea
mbers.



SCHEDULE



This is a part-time role at 20 hours per week, Monday through Friday (4 hours per day). Core working hours are 9:00 AM to 1:00 PM Pacific Daylight Time (PDT) to ensure overlap with US business hours for prospect calls. Filipino candidates accustomed to US BPO overnight shifts are strongly encouraged to apply. There is a clear path to full-time (40 hours per week) for top performers.



WHAT WE ARE LOOKING FOR



Required:



 - Strong written and spoken English — you will be
ing and calling US business executives daily

 - Proven experience in B2B cold calling, outbound sales, or appointment setting

 - Comfortable reaching out to founders, CMOs, and marketing directors directly

 - Self-motivated, organized, and able to hit daily output targets independently

 - Reliable high-speed internet connection and a quiet workspace for calls

 - Available to work 9:00 AM – 1:00 PM PDT Monday through Friday



Preferred (Strong Advantage):



 ? Direct experience with Aircall for outbound calling

 ? Direct experience with Zoho CRM or HubSpot for pipeline management

 ? Background in BPO, call center, or US-facing sales accounts

 ? Experience with LinkedIn outreach tools such as Dripify or Sales Navigator

 ? Prior sponsorship sales, partnership outreach, or cause-based marketing experience



TOOLS & RESOURCES PROVIDED BY PARKED INNOVATIONS



 - Aircall account with a dedicated US phone number for all outbound calls

 - Zoho CRM access with a pre-built sponsorship pipeline

 - Professional Parked Innovations company
 address for all outreach

 - Proven 5-step cold
 and call sequence with templates ready to use

 - Objection handling cheat sheet for common sponsor pushbacks

 - Training library covering the program, the tiers, and the pitch

 - Weekly 1-on-1 check-in with the Parked Innovations team for coaching and feedback



HOW TO APPLY



Send the following to be considered:



 1. A short introduction about yourself and your sales or outreach experience

 2. A sample cold
 you would send to a Shark Tank alumni company pitching a $1,000 Silver sponsorship on behalf of Parked Innovations and the Dwell Behind the Shield program

 3. A voice audition recording reading your cold pitch
 aloud — we want to hear your tone, clarity, confidence, and how you would sound to a real sponsor on the phone. You may record using any free tool such as Vocaroo, Loom, or a WhatsApp voice message and include the link in your application

 4. Your availability, time zone, and
 or Zoom ID for an interview



Applications without both a sample cold
 AND a voice audition recording will not be considered.



We are hiring immediately. Only serious, motivated applicants ready to earn through performance should apply.

title: Recruiter
description:
We are looking for a dedicated and proactive Recruiter to join our team.



Your main responsibility will be to find and recruit talent for different roles as needed (e.g., designers, outreachers, marketers). You will actively search in forums, groups, job boards, and other platforms to identify potential candidates.



Your tasks include:



Sourcing candidates from various online platforms

Reaching out and communicating with candidates daily on

Qualifying candidates through questions and skill assessments

Testing their abilities when necessary

Maintaining consistent follow-up until they are ready to join the team



Requirements:



Strong communication skills

Ability to identify and qualify talent effectively

Fast response time and daily availability

Highly responsible and organized

Available 7 days per week, minimum 8 hours per day



Compensation:



$300/month base salary + $50 for each candidate you recruit who stays in the team for at least 1 month

Base salary can increase if you are committed.



We are looking for someone reliable, committed, and results-driven.

title: Finance Manager
description:
4 to 7 hours per week on average.  The ideal candidate is looking for part time work initially but would like to grow into more hours as the business grows.



This is a comprehensive role where you would serve as a staff member of the firm.  We want somebody to manage a couple of small businesses, including our growing accounting practice.  We hope that it is something that will grow into a bigger job, but right now the owner personally handles most of the finances, and spends four to seven hours per week. This role is to help the owner with the internal finances.



Will involve bookkeeping and accounting, vendor bill pay, payroll, client billing, cash flow forecasting and management, good understanding of debits and credits, financial reporting, among other things.  Need experience in all these things, please. 

 

Accounting software: wave and QBO.

 

Platform: Google Drive – a couple accounts 

 

We have an accounting platform where we do billing.

 

For the accounting firm, this role will manage all of the client billing, payroll, collecting timesheets from staff, and all of financial activity in collaboration with the owner, cash flow forecasting, QuickBooks management, bank recs, and financial reporting, 1099’s on an annual basis.  Billing warrants a need to understand professional service firm accounting: we bill our time, so every time unit is both a payroll event and a revenue event if time spent on a client. Billable time is WIP on the balance sheet that converts to A/R when billed, etc.  We do payroll on a 1st through 15thpay period and a 16th through last day of the month pay period, with pay date happening within 1-2 days of the period. So the person has to be able to be available on those days so that people get paid.  We do billing on a monthly basis, so the person has to be ready to work on billing with me in the first 1-4 days after month end.  

 

Some other finance, accounting, bill pay and other activity for other small businesses.  

 

We have a set of processes to follow – checklists, processes, electronic checkbooks, cash flow forecasting, etc. 

 

You would be the “finance manager” of Baker CFO Advisory, handling all these matters.  I’m looking for somebody that has the experience to see that this is like managing several small businesses, and is accustomed to a fairly routine finance department set of tasks with some interplay between the entities.  That person needs the “finance”, cash management, and accounting experience.  I also expect and am a-ok with a learning curve.  That learning curve is to learn the institutional knowledge, learn our style, etc., but not to learn how to do this job.   Rather, it’s about taking experience from doing this work elsewhere and applying it to the mechanics of this place.  

 

The work is generally flexible throughout the week with the exception of the billing and payroll deadlines as described above.

title: Senior Digital Operations Manager
description:
Senior Digital Operations Manager



Remote | Full-Time | Experienced Professionals Only



Premium International Group is hiring a Senior Digital Operations Manager to oversee digital systems, workflows, and team coordination across multiple business divisions.



This role is responsible for making sure our systems run smoothly, teams stay organized, and operations move efficiently every day.



We are looking for someone who already has strong experience managing remote teams, digital systems, and business operations.



This is not an entry-level role and we are not looking to train someone from scratch.



Business Areas You Will Support



Our operations include several service divisions:



Credit Analysis



Credit Restoration



Tax Preparation



Real Estate Services



Insurance Services



Personal and Business Funding



Immigration Services



These services operate through digital systems including CRM platforms, automation workflows, and AI tools.



Core Responsibilities



Operations Management



Monitor daily business operations and workflows



Maintain organized systems and operational structure



Identify problems and implement solutions quickly



Team Management



Manage and coordinate remote tea
mbers



Assign tasks and track team performance



Ensure projects and client work are completed on time



CRM and Systems



Manage CRM pipelines and lead tracking



Monitor automation workflows and integrations



Maintain organized client data and reporting



Automation and AI



Monitor automated systems and workflows



Ensure AI tools and automation processes are functioning correctly



Improve operational efficiency where possible



Reporting



Provide daily or weekly operational updates



Track system activity and team performance



Report operational issues and improvements



Required Experience



Applicants must have experience with:



Managing remote teams or staff



Digital operations management



CRM platforms and workflow systems



Automation tools and digital systems



Task and project management



Strong leadership, communication, and organization skills are required.



Important



Please apply only if you:



Have real experience managing teams



Have experience with digital systems and operations



Can work independently and solve operational issues



Are organized and detail-oriented



Compensation



Compensation will be based on experience and qualifications.



This is a long-term position with opportunity for growth.



Application Instructions



To help us identify serious applicants who can follow directions, please do the following:



Start your application message with the words:

How many people have you managed before?



What CRM systems have you worked with?



What automation or AI tools have you used?

Applications that do not follow these instructions may not be reviewed.

title: Full-Time Advanced GoHighLevel Consultant  Funnel, Automation & AI Strategist
description:
Are you a GoHighLevel pro who thrives on building powerful systems, automations, and AI tools that help businesses scale?

We’re looking for a tech-savvy, detail-oriented Virtual Assistant & GHL Specialist to join our fast-growing, remote team.



You’ll support an executive and business coach who helps entrepreneurs and agencies grow through systems, automation, and leadership development.

If you love solving tech challenges, connecting tools, and turning business ideas into seamless automated systems — this role is for you.



 Key Responsibilities



Design, build, and optimize AI Agents (chat and voice) and IVR flows within GoHighLevel.



Develop and manage automation workflows, pipelines, triggers, and campaigns to support client business processes.



Proactively identify what needs to be built inside GHL — without waiting for detailed step-by-step instructions.



Troubleshoot and resolve technical issues quickly, ensuring smooth performance across all systems.



Collaborate with the team to improve workflows, integrations, and automations.



Implement client projects following CRM, automation, and marketing best practices.



Stay up to date with new GHL features and recommend ways to leverage them for better efficiency and growth.



 Requirements



Proven GoHighLevel Specialist with deep platform expertise.



Hands-on experience building AI chat and voice bots, IVR systems, and advanced automations.



Strong understanding of CRM systems, lead nurturing, pipelines, and campaign management.



Ability to take initiative, identify process gaps, and create automated solutions.



Excellent problem-solving, communication, and organization skills.



Comfortable working independently in a remote, fast-paced environment.



Nice to Have



Experience with API integrations and webhooks inside GHL.



Background in digital marketing or sales funnels.



Familiarity with AI tools and automation platforms such as Make, Zapier, or n8n.



 Work Details



Start Part-Time, with the ability to move to Full-Time within the first month.



Must be available to work Monday through Saturday, 9 AM – 5 PM EST.



You’ll be supported by a team of full-time HighLevel consultants and automation experts.



We value flexibility, responsibility, and quality work — if you deliver results, we trust you fully.



 How to Apply



Please follow the instructions carefully — attention to detail is key for this role.



Send us:



Your resume link



Your WhatsApp number



A 1-minute intro video sharing your GoHighLevel expertise and experience



 Subject line: GHL Specialist

 Secret Keyword: Automation Mastery



 Please do not apply if you lack GoHighLevel experience.

description:

title: AI Animated Video Creator (Long-Term Gig Role)
description:
We are looking for a talented AI Animated Video Creator to join our team on a long-term gig basis. This is not just a one-off freelance project. We want someone we can work with consistently — a reliable creative partner who becomes a fixed part of our content workflow.



About the role:

- You will create short animated videos using AI tools and creative editing skills.

- The videos are usually based on health/wellness-style educational content, explainer content, or social media storytelling.

- We are looking for someone who can take a script or idea and turn it into an engaging, polished animated video.



What you’ll do:

- Create short-form animated videos using AI tools

- Turn scripts, prompts, or rough concepts into compelling visual content

- Generate scenes, motion, characters, backgrounds, and visual storytelling elements

- Edit and assemble videos for social media platforms

- Add subtitles, sound effects, music, pacing, and transitions where needed

- Keep a consistent visual quality and style across videos

- Deliver content on time and communicate clearly with the team

- Improve workflows and suggest better tools or creative ideas when useful



What we’re looking for:

- Experience creating AI-generated animated videos

- Strong understanding of storytelling, pacing, and visual flow

- Ability to use AI video and design tools efficiently

- Good editing skills for short-form content

- Strong eye for quality, detail, and audience engagement

- Reliable communication and consistent delivery

- Open to long-term collaboration

- Able to follow brand direction, but also bring creative input



Tools / skills that are a plus

Experience with tools such as:

- Runway

- Pika

- Midjourney

- Kling

- CapCut

- Premiere Pro

- After Effects

- ChatGPT or other AI prompting tools



You do not need to use all of these, but you should already be comfortable working with modern AI content tools.



Type of content



Most videos will be:

- Short-form social media videos

- Explainer-style videos

- Animated educational videos

- AI-enhanced storytelling content



What matters most



We care about:

- Quality

- Speed

- Creativity

- Reliability



Long-term fit

- We are not looking for someone who disappears after one task.

- We want someone dependable who can grow with our team and become our go-to person for this type of content.



Payment / setup:

- Gig-based / per project or per video

- Ongoing work for the right person

- Potential for steady weekly volume

- Long-term collaboration preferred



To apply



Please send:

- A short introduction about yourself

- Examples of animated videos you made with AI

- The tools you use

- Your rate per video or per project

- Your turnaround time

- Your favorite type of AI video work



Please include the word “ANIMATE” in your application so we know you read the full post.

title: Tier 2 Helpdesk Technician
description:
Position Summary



We are a small managed service provider (MSP) looking for a Helpdesk Technician who can own the full support lifecycle — from first-contact triage through advanced troubleshooting — across our client base. You’ll be the primary point of contact for end users, handling everything from password resets and printer issues to Microsoft 365 administration, network diagnostics, and server-level troubleshooting. Because we’re a small team, you’ll wear many hats, work directly with clients, and have real impact on how we deliver service.

Essential Duties and Responsibilities



Front-Line Support



• Answer incoming calls,
s, and tickets; log all requests accurately in the PSA/ticketing system (Superops)

• Perform initial triage — gather symptoms, identify urgency, and resolve straightforward issues on first contact when possible

• Handle common requests: password resets, MFA setup, account unlocks, new-user onboarding/offboarding,
 and calendar issues, printer troubleshooting, and basic software installs

• Walk end users through solutions clearly and patiently, adapting communication style to non-technical audiences

Advanced Troubleshooting

• Troubleshoot complex workstation, laptop, and peripheral issues across Windows 10/11 and macOS environments

• Administer and maintain Active Directory, Azure AD / Entra ID, Microsoft 365 tenants, and Group Policy across multiple client environments

• Diagnose network connectivity problems including DNS, DHCP, VPN, Wi-Fi, firewall rules, and switching/routing basics

• Support and maintain RMM tools (Superops) for monitoring, patching, and remote access

• Investigate recurring issues, perform root-cause analysis, and implement lasting fixes rather than repeated band-aids

• Assist with server administration tasks: reboots, service restarts, disk space management, backup verification, and basic Hyper-V/VMware operations

• Support cloud platforms and SaaS applications common to the client base (Microsoft 365, Google Workspace, line-of-business apps)



MSP Operations



• Manage and prioritize your own ticket queue across multiple clients, meeting or exceeding SLA response and resolution targets

• Create and maintain client-specific documentation, SOPs, and knowledge base articles in the company documentation platform (Hudu)

• Participate in onboarding new clients — inventorying assets, documenting environments, and setting up monitoring and management tools

• Coordinate with vendors and third-party providers when escalation beyond our scope is needed

• Assist with project work as needed: workstation deployments, migrations, network upgrades, and office moves

• Contribute to improving internal processes, automation, and service delivery quality



Required Qualifications



• Excellent English Language Skills, both written and verbal

• 2+ years of hands-on IT support experience; MSP experience strongly preferred

• Solid working knowledge of Windows 10/11, macOS, Microsoft 365 administration, and Active Directory / Azure AD

• Understanding of networking fundamentals: TCP/IP, DNS, DHCP, VPN, VLANs, and basic firewall concepts

• Experience with a PSA or ticketing system and an RMM platform

• Ability to manage multiple client environments and context-switch effectively throughout the day

• Strong communication skills — comfortable speaking directly with clients ranging from small business owners to office staff

• Self-motivated and able to work independently; you won’t always have someone looking over your shoulder



Preferred Qualifications



• Industry certifications such as CompTIA A+, Network+, Security+, or Microsoft 365 Certified

• Experience with endpoint management tools (Intune, Jamf)

• Familiarity with scripting or automation (PowerShell, Bash, or Python)

• Experience supporting backup and disaster recovery solutions (Datto, Veeam, Acronis)

• Exposure to basic security concepts: EDR tools,
 filtering, security awareness training platforms

title: DIRECT RESPONSE VSL EDITOR
description:
We are looking for a high-speed, high-output Direct Response VSL Editor to join our team. We provide the scripts; you provide the visual storytelling, pacing, and "pattern interrupts" that keep viewers glued to the screen.



This isn't about making "pretty" videos—it's about making videos that convert.



### Key Responsibilities

Content Sourcing: You must be an expert at finding high-quality b-roll, stock footage, and relevant 
s/clips that align perfectly with our scripts.



High-Impact Editing: Mastery of pacing, sound design, and text overlays to maximize retention.



Direct Response Focus: Understanding when to use fast cuts versus when to let a point breathe based on the sales psychology of the script.



Speed & Reliability: This is a full-time role. We move fast, and we expect a high volume of quality output without constant hand-holding.



### Requirements

Proven Portfolio: You must show previous VSL or high-retention social media work.



Software Mastery: Expert level in Adobe Premiere Pro and/or After Effects.



The "Vibe" Check: Ability to match the visual style to different niches and audiences.



Efficiency: Ability to turn around long-form VSLs (10–30 mins) quickly.



### ?? Our Hiring Process

We do not hire based on portfolios alone. We value real-world execution over a highlight reel. Our process is:



Portfolio Review: We check your past work.



The Test Task: If your portfolio passes, we will send you a test script segment. You will be required to source the footage and edit it to show us your style and speed.



Interview & Hire: If the test task hits our standards, we move to a full-time offer.



### How to Apply

Please send your portfolio link and a brief summary of your experience with Direct Response. Use the subject line: "Fast VSL Editor Ready for Test Task."

title: TECHNICAL SUPPORT ENGINEER (INTEGRATIONS, QA, APIs) - US HOURS | G2 AWARD-WINNING US COMPANY
description:
Remote (Philippines) | Full-Time | Long-Term Role



You’re not looking to gig hop — you’re looking to build a career with a high-performing US-based team.



If you’re strong at troubleshooting, clear communication, and taking ownership, this role will feel right.



We’re hiring a Technical Support Engineer to help us solve real problems, improve systems, and grow into deeper technical responsibility over time.



We’re hiring a Technical Support Engineer to help us:



* resolve real customer issues

* improve QA and release confidence

* support go-lives and integrations

* reduce unnecessary interruptions to development

* strengthen how support, operations, and development work together



This is not entry-level support.

This is not a pure QA role.

This is not a junior developer role.



This is a hands-on technical role for someone who can work through ambiguity, think clearly, and move problems toward resolution without constant direction.



You do not need to be a full software engineer. But you do need to be comfortable with technical systems, structured data, debugging, and learning fast.



This role is a strong fit for someone from:



* technical support

* implementation support

* support engineering

* QA

* technical operations



ABOUT TOKEN OF TRUST



Token of Trust is a G2-recognized, award-winning platform that helps regulated ecommerce businesses verify consumer identities and comply with excise tax and reporting requirements.



We operate at the intersection of ecommerce, compliance, and trust — solving real-world problems for businesses that cannot afford to get it wrong.



We are a small, high-performing team. We value ownership, focus, continuous improvement, and delivering real results.



We are building a company where strong contributors can grow into deeper technical ownership over time — not just do a job, but become increasingly valuable as the company scales.



WHAT YOU’LL OWN



Technical Support Leadership (Primary Focus)



You will become the primary technical support person assigned to the Operations team for issues that require real troubleshooting discipline.



You will:



* triage, reproduce, and drive resolution of technical support issues

* distinguish between user error, configuration issues, integration problems, and product defects

* gather the right evidence before escalating to Development

* build and improve technical support playbooks so recurring issues can be delegated effectively

* personally drive challenging, ambiguous, or business-critical technical issues to closure

* communicate clearly with customers and internal teams during investigations

* become the trusted technical point of contact for operational issues that require strong judgment



QA and Release Confidence



You will be among the first to test new features and functionality so we can catch issues earlier and release with greater confidence.



You will:



* execute regression testing on key product flows

* write clean, reproducible bug reports with useful technical detail

* validate fixes before production release

* help reduce production surprises through disciplined testing and clear coverage

* build confidence that new functionality works across important use cases

* over time, help automate portions of regression testing and release validation



Go-Lives and Integration Enablement



You will help bring clients live successfully and, over time, act as the technical point person on go-lives and integration efforts.



You will:



* assist with client go-lives and implementation tasks

* configure plugins and integrations across platforms such as WordPress, WooCommerce, Shopify, and BigCommerce

* in some cases, make small technical customizations such as WordPress hooks, lightweight scripting, or small amounts of injected JavaScript

* participate in screen-share sessions with customers

* inspect settings, payloads, API behavior, and structured data to identify setup or integration issues

* over time, lead go-lives independently using well-understood technical playbooks, including cases that require light customization



Automation and Structured Operations



As the role grows, you will help identify and close the missing pieces required to automate chunks of workflow and make operations more efficient, less error-prone, and easier to diagnose.



You will:



* work with JSON, YAML, CSV, and other structured data used in our systems and processes

* use APIs, logs, internal tools, and technical artifacts to investigate issues and confirm behavior

* build or maintain light scripts, prompts, checklists, and internal artifacts that make the team more effective

* help codify recurring troubleshooting, QA, and go-live patterns so the organization gets stronger over time

* identify repetitive manual work, unclear handoffs, and avoidable sources of error, then help structure better ways of working

* contribute to a longer-term path into deeper technical operations, QA automation, or development-support work



WHAT SUCCESS LOOKS LIKE IN THE FIRST 90 DAYS



* technical issues are reproduced more quickly and escalated more cleanly

* known issues are increasingly handled through clear playbooks rather than repeated ad hoc investigation

* QA catches issues earlier

* go-lives become smoother

* Development spends less time on preventable support interruptions

* leadership is pulled into emergency situations less often because problems are identified sooner and clients are kept informed earlier

* repetitive operational work starts getting documented, structured, or automated



REQUIREMENTS



* strong written and spoken English

* availability to work 8 hours per day within US hours, with US Central overlap required

* experience in technical support, Level 2+ support, QA, implementation, or a similar troubleshooting-heavy role

* familiarity with ecommerce systems (e.g. WordPress/WooCommerce, Shopify, and/or BigCommerce)

* strong troubleshooting and problem-solving skills

* comfort working with JSON, YAML, CSV, and other structured technical information

* comfort reading API documentation and inspecting request/response behavior

* ability to write clear bug reports, technical notes, escalation summaries, and playbooks

* strong follow-through and self-direction

* reliable internet and a professional video-call environment

* familiarity using AI tools for drafting, analysis, or structured work, along with the judgment to verify correctness



PREFERRED



* experience using browser dev tools, Postman, curl, or similar debugging tools

* basic JavaScript, Python, PHP, or scripting ability

* experience validating integrations, webhooks, configuration, or data mappings

* experience with regression testing or QA process discipline



COMPENSATION



* starting at $900 to $1,200 USD per month depending on experience, hours, and demonstrated technical ability

* paid trial project before full offer

* long-term position



We are not trying to be the highest-paying listing for this type of role.



We are trying to be one of the best long-term opportunities for someone who wants to grow, take ownership, and become increasingly valuable to the team.



This role qualifies for our Growth and Incentive Program, where strong performance can lead to performance bonuses and permanent compensation increases as the company grows.



We also have a culture of continuous improvement. People who raise standards, build better playbooks, reduce repeat issues, improve workflows, increase automation, and make the company more effective can earn greater trust, responsibility, and upside over time.



We reward people who take ownership, raise standards, and deliver consistent results.



WHY THIS ROLE IS DIFFERENT



This is not a ticket-processing role.



You will not be judged only by how many tickets you touch.



You will be valued for:



* solving real problems

* improving how the company operates

* reducing repeated issues

* creating clarity

* building systems and playbooks that scale



For the right person, this is a real growth path — not just a support seat.



Over time, strong performance here can grow into:



* deeper QA ownership

* more responsibility for go-lives and technical implementations

* support workflow automation

* technical operations leadership

* selected development-adjacent work



HOW TO APPLY



We take hiring seriously because we are protective of our high-performing team and this is a long-term role. Applications that do not follow these instructions will not be considered.



It is okay to use AI to help organize or polish your application. In fact, we expect you to. But your answers must still reflect your own experience, judgment, and thinking.



To confirm that you read this posting carefully, start your application with this exact phrase:



I Raise the Bar.



Please include all of the following:



1. Availability

   Your exact US-hours availability, including your time zone and working hours.



2. Ownership story

   In 5 to 8 sentences, describe one real technical support, QA, or integration issue you owned end-to-end. Tell us what happened, what you did, how you approached it, and what the outcome was.



3. Technical triage response

   Respond to this scenario:



A customer reports that checkout verification is failing for most users on their live site, but the team cannot reproduce it in staging.



Please include:



* what you would check first

* the clarifying questions you would ask

* the likely categories of root cause you would consider

* what you would communicate back to the team or customer next



We read every serious application carefully.



If you take ownership, solve problems, communicate clearly, and want to grow, we would like to hear from you.

description:
Are you great at selling tenants on rentals, screening them fast, and closing deals all the way through lease signing and move-in?

We’re a fast-growing property management group managing LTRs and PadSplit homes. We’re looking for someone smart, diligent, and proactive — someone who thrives on results, not supervision.



If you know how to:

- Market and lease properties quickly

- Prequalify and screen tenants effectively

- Coordinate move-ins and manage lead funnels

…then you’ll fit right in.





Long term, you’ll have the chance to build and lead your own leasing team as we scale.





Requirements:

- Strong leasing or property management experience (LTR or co-living preferred)

- Excellent spoken and written English (C2 level)

- High attention to detail, strong follow-through, and responsive communication

- Available to work U.S. EST/ET hours





If this sounds like you, we’d love to hear from you. Apply now and start making an impact immediately.





DO NOT APPLY IF:



Your English is not near-native or highly fluent (C2 level).

You do not have a strong leasing background.

You do not have a background in sales.

You are not tech-savvy.

You are not detail-oriented and highly diligent.

You need constant supervision or struggle to take ownership.





Application Process:

- Submit your resume and a short video introduction (via Google Drive or Loom — make sure the link is accessible). In your video, briefly introduce yourself and share why you’d be great for this role.

- Send us a message on OnlineJobs.ph explaining why you’re the right fit and what makes you stand out.

- Wait for our response — we carefully review every application and will contact shortlisted candidates for the next steps.



Thank you!

title: Executive Administrative Assistant to the CEO
description:
About Us



Xico Enterprises Inc. is a growing company based in Victoria, British Columbia. We specialize in commercial and residential painting and work with contractors, developers, and homeowners across Vancouver Island.



The CEO manages two businesses, including Xico Enterprises Inc. and another service company, requiring strong organizational and operational support.



Our culture is built around professionalism, respect, ownership, discipline, and long-term growth. We are not looking for short-term freelancers. We are building a strong and reliable team that grows together.



We are looking for an Executive Administrative Assistant who will help the CEO stay organized, manage operations, and improve systems that keep the company running efficiently.



Position Overview



You will work directly with the CEO, supporting both business operations and selective personal administrative tasks. Your role is to help maintain organization across projects, manage communication, support customer service, and build systems that improve efficiency.



This role requires someone who is highly organized, proactive, disciplined, and comfortable working independently.



The ideal candidate enjoys creating structure, solving problems, and helping a business grow.



This is a long-term position with growth opportunities.



Work Schedule



Overnight schedule aligned with Pacific Standard Time in Canada.



Typical shift range



11:00 PM to 7:00 AM Philippines time. Exact hours may vary slightly depending on the season and daylight savings.



Candidates must be comfortable working overnight on a long-term basis and should have prior experience supporting teams or clients across different time zones.



Main Responsibilities



Executive and Administrative Support



• Manage and organize company
 inboxes, prioritize incoming communications, and respond to clients or internal messages when appropriate.

• Schedule meetings, calls, and appointments

• Prepare documents and organize files

• Track tasks, deadlines, and projects

• Maintain organized records and documentation

• Follow and improve administrative SOPs

• Help implement new systems that improve efficiency

• Assist with research, reports, and operational tasks

• Anticipate needs and prepare information, documents, or updates before meetings and important conversations



Business Operations Support



• Assist with daily operations for two businesses

• Help organize project information and schedules

• Track client communications and follow-ups

• Help maintain organized digital systems for files and projects

• Assist with coordination between tea
mbers

• Help maintain organization across both companies by tracking priorities, communications, and operational tasks





Customer Service and Communication



• Answer and manage incoming calls

• Respond to customer inquiries

• Help maintain professional communication with clients

• Organize and track customer service requests

• Follow up with customers when needed



Personal Administrative Support



• Assist the CEO with personal scheduling when required

• Help organize travel, appointments, and personal tasks when needed

• Maintain organized reminder systems for meetings, deadlines, follow-ups, and important commitments

• Proactively monitor tasks, deadlines, and commitments to ensure the CEO stays on schedule and nothing is missed

• Prepare daily or weekly priority summaries for the CEO to help organize upcoming meetings, tasks, and important decisions

• Maintain confidentiality and professionalism





System Building and Process Improvement



• Create or improve systems for the organization

• Develop workflows that improve efficiency

• Help maintain structure across administrative processes

• Identify opportunities to improve organization and communication



Required Skills



   * Excellent written and spoken English

   * Strong organizational skills

   * Ability to manage multiple priorities

   * Fast response and decision making

   * Strong attention to detail

   * Ability to work independently

   * Professional communication skills

   * Reliable power, internet and computer

   * Comfortable working overnight long-term



Preferred but not required



Experience supporting executives or business owners

Experience with project management tools such as:



* Google Workspace

* Asana

* Spreadsheets/Excel

* Canva

* Microsoft 



Customer service experience



• Experience managing
 and scheduling systems



• Basic understanding of construction or service businesses is a plus, but not required.



What We Value



- Ownership and accountability

- Discipline and reliability

- Professional communication

- Respect and teamwork

- Problem-solving mindset

- Long-term commitment

- Initiative and system thinking



Growth Opportunity



This role offers long-term growth within the Office of the CEO, with the opportunity to evolve into a CEO Office Manager or Executive Support Lead position, helping coordinate executive priorities, manage key initiatives, and build the internal systems that support multiple businesses as the company expands.



We prefer candidates who want to build a long-term career and grow with the company.



Salary



Competitive salary based on experience.



Salary increases will be considered based on performance, responsibility, and contribution to the company.



*Application Instructions*



To apply, please answer the following questions in your application.



Tell us about your experience supporting executives or business owners.



Why are you interested in working with a Canadian company long-term?



What do you know about Xico Enterprises Inc.?



Have you worked overnight supporting a different time zone?



Describe a system or process you created that improved organization in your previous role.



Why did you leave your last job?



What tools do you use to organize work and manage tasks?



How do you stay disciplined and productive when working remotely overnight?



Where do you see yourself professionally in three years?



To confirm that you carefully read this job description, please start your application with the words XICO ORGANIZED.



Applications that do not follow these instructions will not be reviewed.

title: Full-Time Performance Video Editor (E-commerce / Meta Ads)
description:
Full-Time Performance Video Editor (E-commerce / Meta Ads)

Remote · Full-time · Paid in Crypto (USDT/USDC)



We’re hiring a full-time video editor for direct-response e-commerce ads.



This is not a branding role and not an organic content role.

You’ll be editing paid social creatives designed to test hooks, angles, offers, pacing, and CTR/CPA performance.



What you’ll do



We give you scripts (hook + body) and our product footage.



You research and source extra visuals that fit the script: stock/B-roll, CC0/public-domain footage, or creator clips with permission.



You combine sourced visuals with our product shots to build converting ad creatives.



Deliver multiple testable variants based on hook, angle, offer, and CTA changes.



Add burned-in captions + SRT.



Export in 9:16, 1:1, and 4:5 with clean file naming ready for structured A/B testing.



What we need



Proven experience editing direct-response Meta ads for e-commerce/DTC brands.



Strong footage sourcing instincts. You know how to find visuals that make a script hit harder.



Fast iteration speed and clear English communication.



Available full-time with at least 4 hours/day overlap with CET.



Comfortable working in CapCut Pro.

[only keep this if truly required]



What matters



15–25 testable variants per week.



Revisions/iterations within 24 hours.



Creative output that helps improve hook hold, CTR, and CPA.



How to apply — follow exactly

 subject: I make ads that convert

First word of your message: mango



Then include:



3 links to e-commerce Meta ads you edited that were used in live campaigns



FB Ad Library link + brand name + what exactly you edited



Max 5 lines on how you approach the first 3 seconds and lowering CPA



Your tools, hardware, render setup, availability, and time zone



Missing any item = no review.

No agencies.



Paid test (shortlist only)

You’ll receive a short script + angle.



Deliver within 48–72h:



3 variants (20–30s)



9:16 + 1:1



Burned-in captions + SRT



Project files



1-page explanation of your hook reasoning + next iteration ideas

title: FACEBOOK OUTREACH VA — Equipment Finance
description:
WHAT THIS JOB IS

I run an equipment finance brokerage in the United States. I help business owners get financing to buy commercial trucks, excavators, and heavy equipment.

I need a part-time VA who can find people on
 who are buying or selling equipment and start real conversations with them. You will comment on posts and send DMs. I will take over when someone is seriously interested.

This is not a customer service job. This is not data entry. This is outreach work that requires you to think, read people, and write messages that sound like a real human being — not a script.

Your job is to find opportunity in conversations. Most people scroll past deals. You need to be able to spot them.

WHAT YOU WILL DO EVERY DAY

• Search
 Marketplace and Groups for equipment listings

• Comment on posts and send DMs using AI-assisted messaging (Claude/ChatGPT)

• Start conversations — not sell, just open doors

• Log every contact in a Google Sheet tracker

• Alert me immediately when someone shows serious interest

Target: 50–100 outreach actions per day (this is very doable within 3–4 hours once you get the flow)

This role starts part-time. For the right person, there is potential to grow into full-time as the business scales.

WHO I AM LOOKING FOR

You are the right person if:

• You use
 personally and understand how people talk on it

• You can write short, casual, natural English — not stiff or formal

• You are comfortable sending messages to strangers and starting conversations

• You can work independently without someone checking on you every hour

• You pay attention to details and never skip steps

• You are comfortable using AI tools like ChatGPT or Claude (I will train you)

• You can read between the lines in conversations (ex: someone joking about a truck might actually be a potential buyer)

• You can work during U.S. daytime hours (at least partially)

YOU ARE NOT THE RIGHT PERSON IF:

• You need a script for every situation and cannot think on your feet

• Your English writing sounds robotic or overly formal

• You have only done data entry or admin work and are not comfortable with outreach

• You are looking for easy, passive work

• You are uncomfortable messaging 50+ people per day

EXPERIENCE

Required:

• At least 1 year VA experience

• Strong written English (conversational, not just correct)

• Active
 user

• Comfortable with Google Sheets

Preferred (not required):

• Outreach, lead generation, or sales support background

• Familiarity with trucking, construction, or equipment industries

• Experience with AI writing tools

TO APPLY

Do NOT send a generic application.

Write me a short message (5–8 sentences) as if you were reaching out to someone selling a semi truck on
 Marketplace.

Make it sound like a real conversation, not a pitch. Reference something specific about the truck (you can make up details).

Bonus: Add one follow-up question that would naturally keep the conversation going.

If it sounds like a template, I will not respond.

If it sounds like a real person who knows how to start a conversation — let’s talk.

title: Senior US Medical Biller / AR Specialist — DME Experience Required — 5+ Years
description:
We are hiring an experienced US Medical Biller / AR Specialist for a long-term independent contractor opportunity.



You must have 5+ years of direct US medical billing experience and direct DME billing experience.



This is not an entry-level role and this is not a training position. If you do not have real, hands-on US medical billing and DME billing experience, please do not apply.



You must be confident with:

 • Claim submission

 • AR follow-up

 • Denials, corrections, and appeals

 • Payment posting

 • Eligibility and benefits verification

 • Authorizations and referrals

 • CPT, ICD-10, HCPCS, modifiers, EOBs, and ERAs

 • EMR, PM, and clearinghouse systems

 • Calling US insurance companies



This is a remote role working closely with a husband-and-wife team. We are looking for someone professional, dependable, detail-oriented, and comfortable working independently.



Schedule:

 • Monday through Friday

 • 9:00 AM to 7:00 PM EST

 • 30-minute unpaid break at 1:30 PM EST

 • Some weekends required when workload requires it



Requirements:

 • 5+ years of direct US medical billing experience

 • Direct DME billing experience required

 • Strong English communication

 • Comfortable using RingCentral

 • Comfortable working through a remote PC / remote desktop

 • Reliable internet and a professional home office

 • Available during the required hours



Hiring requirements:

 • Smile Checks background screening

 • Criminal background verification

 • Reference verification

 • Contractor onboarding and agreement through Deel



Long-term opportunity:

This is a long-term independent contractor opportunity. We are looking to build an ongoing working relationship with the right person for as long as the arrangement continues to be a good fit for both sides.



Do not apply if:

 • You do not have 5+ years of direct US medical billing experience

 • You do not have direct DME billing experience

 • Your background is mainly admin, VA, customer service, or coursework only

 • You need training on billing basics



To apply, include:

 1. Total years of US medical billing experience

 2. Total years of DME billing experience

 3. Specialties billed

 4. EMR / PM / clearinghouse systems used

 5. A short explanation of how you handle a denied DME claim

 6. Resume

 7. Voice recording in English

 8. Confirmation that you are comfortable with Smile Checks, Deel, RingCentral, remote PC work, the required schedule, and working with a husband-and-wife team



Required first line of application:

I have 5+ years of direct US medical billing experience and direct DME billing experience.

title: Senior Salesforce Developer (Automation & Flow Specialist)
description:
About the Role

We are seeking an experienced Senior Salesforce Developer to manage, improve, and maintain our Salesforce system used for marketing, sales, and student enrollment operations within an international education company.

This role focuses heavily on Salesforce Flow automation, troubleshooting existing automation, improving system performance, and implementing scalable Salesforce solutions.

You will help maintain and expand a complex Salesforce installation used by internal sales and operations teams.

________________________________________

Responsibilities

Salesforce Automation

• Design, build, and maintain Salesforce Flows

• Troubleshoot and improve existing automation

• Implement lead routing and pipeline automation

• Improve reliability and performance of workflows

Development

• Write and maintain Apex classes and triggers

• Build Lightning Web Components (LWC)

• Improve internal Salesforce tools and user experience

• Follow Salesforce development best practices

System Optimization

• Audit the current Salesforce configuration

• Identify inefficient automation and improve architecture

• Maintain roles, permissions, and security

• Ensure system reliability and performance

Integrations

title: Outbound Enrollment Closer – Career Certification Coursess (Remote, EST)
description:
Outbound Enrollment Closer – Career Certification Programs (Remote, EST)

This is not customer service.

This is not inbound order-taking.

This is a phone-driven, outbound enrollment closer role for professionals who know how to control a consult, qualify quickly, handle objections, and close.

We are a U.S.-based online career school enrolling students into IT and Project Management certification programs including:

• CompTIA certification

• Project Management Professional (PMP) certification

We provide warm leads.

You bring the discipline, urgency, and closing skill.

________________________________________

What You’ll Be Doing (Daily Reality)

• Make high-volume outbound calls to prospective students

• Run structured consultative enrollment calls

o Needs analysis ? recommendation ? close

• Control the conversation and ask directly for the enrollment

• Handle objections around price, time, confidence, and urgency

• Follow up relentlessly until the prospect converts or disqualifies

• Log activity and outcomes accurately in the CRM

• Hit daily activity targets and monthly enrollment goals

• Improve close rates through coaching, scripts, and call reviews

If you don’t like calling, this role will break you.

________________________________________

Who This Role Is For

• Proven outbound / inside sales closers

• Comfortable dialing daily and living on the phone

• Strong command of English with U.S. cultural fluency

• Confident asking direct questions and pushing for decisions

• Competitive, coachable, and metrics-driven

• Organized and accountable without supervision

Experience selling education, training, coaching, or professional services is a major plus.

Familiarity with CompTIA or PMP programs helps—but closing ability matters more.

Bachelor’s degree required.

________________________________________

Who Should NOT Apply

Do not apply if you:

• Only want inbound leads

• Are uncomfortable asking for money

• Avoid objection handling

• Want a “soft” admissions role

• Struggle with activity targets

• Disappear when pressure increases

This is a performance environment.

________________________________________

Schedule

Monday – Friday

10:00 AM – 6:30 PM EST

________________________________________

Compensation

Base pay: $1,200 – $1,600 USD per month

Performance-based advancement and leadership path.

Long-term role with stability and growth for performers.

Top performers move quickly.

Average performers do not last.

________________________________________

What You Get

• Warm leads with real intent

• Clear scripts, frameworks, and coaching

• Legitimate career certification programs

• A sales culture that rewards results

• Real opportunity for long-term growth

________________________________________

Application Instructions (Important)

To apply:

1. Submit your resume

2. Include a short paragraph describing your best closing experience

3. Record a 1-minute Loom video explaining how you handle price objections

At the top of your application message, include the phrase:

“I close.”

Applications without this phrase will not be considered.

________________________________________

Bottom Line

If you can:

• Control a sales conversation

• Build urgency without lying

• Close consistently

• Take coaching and improve

You will win here.

If not—this role will expose you quickly.

title: Virtual Medical Assistant
description:
Join Our Team as a Virtual Medical Assistant (Mental Health)



Are you a highly organized, tech-savvy professional who thrives in a fast-paced environment? We’re looking for an experienced Virtual Medical Assistant to become an essential part of a growing mental health practice that primarily serves children and adolescents.



In this role, you’ll play a key part in both patient interaction and behind-the-scenes operations. If you’re confident working independently, enjoy problem-solving, and take pride in delivering exceptional support—while also collaborating effectively with a fellow Virtual Assistant—this could be the perfect opportunity for you.



What You’ll Do



As a vital member of our remote team, you will:

• Coordinate patient intake, scheduling, and ongoing appointment management 

• Communicate professionally with patients and families via phone, fax, and secure messaging 

• Assist with medical charting and maintain accurate documentation within the EHR system 

• Manage referrals and ensure seamless follow-up care 

• Process prior authorizations (via Cover
ds) and medication refill requests 

• Handle both front-office and back-office administrative responsibilities 

• Collaborate closely with clinicians to support daily workflows 

• Uphold strict HIPAA compliance and maintain patient confidentiality at all times 



What You Bring



We’re seeking someone who is reliable, detail-oriented, and experienced in medical administration. Ideal candidates will have:

• Full-time availability for a remote position 

• Previous experience in mental health (experience with children/adolescents strongly preferred) 

• HIPAA certification 

• Hands-on experience with SimplePractice EHR 

• Familiarity with Spruce phone and fax systems 

• Advanced proficiency in Google Workspace (Gmail, Calendar, Docs, Sheets, Drive) 

• Strong communication skills (written and verbal) 

• The ability to work independently after training while remaining a collaborative team player 

• A high level of professionalism, dependability, and integrity 



Technical Requirements



To succeed in this fully remote role, you’ll need:

• A secure, reliable computer with VPN protection 

• Stable, high-speed internet 

• A quiet, efficient remote work environment 



What Sets You Apart



• Exceptional organizational and time-management skills 

• A proactive mindset with strong critical-thinking abilities 

• Comfort handling sensitive information with discretion and care 



 What We Offer



• Fully remote, full-time schedule (40 hours per week) 

• A supportive, collaborative team culture 

• A well-reviewed practice with consistent 5-star patient feedback 

• Meaningful work that positively impacts mental health care for young patients 

• Annual Christmas bonus 

• Regular salary reviews at 3, 6, 9, and 12 months 



If you’re ready to bring your skills to a purpose-driven team and make a real difference, we’d love to hear from you!

title: GoHighLevel Automation specialist
description:
HIRING: GoHighLevel Specialist for Cash-Based Chiropractic Practice

???? Remote | Part-Time to Start | Long-Term Opportunity

???? $5–$8/hr depending on experience



---



ABOUT US



Davis Family Chiropractic is a 27-year cash-based chiropractic practice in Raleigh, North Carolina. We specialize in pediatric, prenatal, and family care. We're growing fast and need a GHL expert to help us build and manage the systems that support that growth.



This is not a general VA role. We need someone who lives and breathes GoHighLevel.



---



WHAT YOU'LL OWN



? Build and manage automated
 sequences for new patients, wellness conversion, reactivation, and postpartum care

? Set up workflows and triggers based on patient milestones (visit counts, tags, appointment dates)

? Create and maintain pipeline stages for new patient lead tracking

? Set up conditional logic branches (e.g. IF tag exists ? skip
, IF missing ? send)

? Connect GHL to our scheduling software (Sked) via webhooks or Zapier

? Manage tags and contact segmentation (new patient, pediatric, prenatal, wellness, lapsed)

? Build and optimize opt-in funnels and landing pages for lead generation campaigns

? Set up and monitor Google and Meta ad integrations inside GHL

? Maintain our ManyChat integration for DM automation

? Troubleshoot broken workflows and sequences proactively — don't wait to be asked



---



YOU ARE A GREAT FIT IF YOU...



? Have 1+ year of hands-on GoHighLevel experience (not just watched tutorials)

? Can build a multi-step automation workflow from scratch without being walked through every step

? Understand tags, triggers, pipelines, conditional branches, and webhooks

? Have experience connecting GHL to third-party tools via Zapier or native integrations

? Communicate clearly in English — written and verbal

? Are proactive: you flag problems before they become fires

? Can work independently with minimal supervision

? Are available for at least 10 hours per week with room to grow



---



THIS IS NOT THE RIGHT FIT IF YOU...



? Are learning GHL on the job

? Need step-by-step instructions for basic automations

? Are looking for a role that includes social media, graphic design, or general admin

? Have only used GHL in an agency white-label environment and don't understand sub-account setup



---



HOW TO APPLY



To be considered, please answer these questions in your application. Applications without answers will not be reviewed.



1. Describe a GHL automation workflow you built from scratch. What was the trigger, what were the steps, and what problem did it solve?



2. Have you ever connected GHL to an external scheduling or CRM tool? How did you do it?



3. What's the difference between a workflow trigger and a workflow action in GHL? Give an example of each.



4. What is your current availability (hours per week and time zone)?



5. What is your GoHighLevel experience level: Beginner / Intermediate / Advanced — and why?



Please include "GHL + DFC" in the subject line of your application so we know you read this carefully.



---



This is a long-term role for the right person. We're a small, mission-driven practice that takes care of families — and we take care of the people who help us do that too.
